programme.title: Down In the Bayou

programme.title: A Duck and Geese Hunt Opener

programme.title: Early Season Panfish
programme.desc: Tyler and Sara hit the ice early in a brand-new season of SJTV and breakdown how locate and catch weed edge dwelling panfish.

programme.title: Foolin' Walleyes

programme.title: Mid-Winter Crappies
programme.desc: Doing your homework in the fall can pay big dividends when it comes to catching giant slabs through the ice once the hardwater season starts.

programme.title: Looking Back '16 - '22
programme.desc: Highlighting some of our favourite memories after 6 years of filming! Weve all grown in so many different ways. What a WILD ride! Hope you enjoy the show!

programme.title: Old Mexico Giant Muley
programme.desc: edicated outdoor producer's short films from around the globe.

programme.title: Can You Hear Me Now?
programme.desc: Rick takes his friend Andy and his brother Michael after some Missouri bucks while chasing one himself!

programme.title: Florida By Day

programme.title: Florida By Night

programme.title: The Legend of Marino Ends
programme.desc: Jared has his best hunt ever on the River Farm, and Mike takes down the legend Marino

programme.title: Giant 8 Point

programme.title: Tennessee Stud

programme.title: Offroad RVing / The Ultimate Fifth Wheel

programme.title: Is a Park Model an RV? / Renting

programme.title: RVing to Mexico
programme.desc: Some RVers avoid Mexico due to concerns about safety or complicated border procedures, but touring in a group makes the beauty and adventure of Mexico possible with ease.

programme.title: Mozambique Crocodile Safari

programme.title: The Firing Line

programme.title: Nicaragua Duck Hunt
programme.desc: Buck & Max visit Nicaragua to explore the country, visit the capital Managua and experience some exciting duck hunting on Lake Managua

programme.title: The Best Encounters of 2023
programme.desc: This week we take a look back at some of the best encounters of 2023. From predators to turkeys and Cape buffalo to screaming bulls, we cover the gamut of big game the world over

programme.title: Sharing Land Conservation
programme.desc: Rich talks about sharing the conservation of the land on the trapline and then a very cool otter and lynx check.

programme.title: The Clam" Before the Storm"

programme.title: Coastal River Chinook Salmon
programme.desc: Casting spinners and jigs for BC river chinook salmon

programme.title: Pacific Coho Salmon

programme.title: Winter Woes
programme.desc: Ben and Nicole have committed to a goal of self-sufficiency. Unfortunately, its proving harder than they thought. Homesteading isnt as glamourous as it may look online. Atlantic Canadian winters are proving more difficult than ever before

programme.title: Spring Cleaning
programme.desc: As winter thaws Ben & Nicole set out to tidy up the yard and prep the garden. With cleanup well underway they pick up a new honeybee hive in hopes of being able to pollinate their garden and reap some sweet, sweet homegrown honey

programme.title: Logan's Bear Blanket
programme.desc: Logan turns this bear into a rug

programme.title: Island Pheasant
programme.desc: Your host Steve Elmy is going to take you on an awesome trip to the most southern inhabited island in Canada for an epic pheasant hunt

programme.title: Sunny Skies Where the Dove Dies

programme.title: Arkansas Duck Hunting
programme.desc: The crew heads to the duck capital of the world with good friend Russell Roberson from Alpha Innovations

programme.title: The Midwest
programme.desc: his week Heath & Brandon head to the Midwest in pursuit of giant whitetails

programme.title: South Dakota
programme.desc: This week Clede Spooner and Matt Cowell head west in pursuit of two species they've never hunted

programme.title: Texas
programme.desc: Watch as Ted and Amber head to Texas for some prairie dog and hog hunting

programme.title: Nighttime Raccoon

programme.title: Early Season Canada Goose
programme.desc: Kyle & Jeff meet up with their buddy Ray Hoody for the early Canada goose season in Michigan

programme.title: South Dakota Pheasant & Jumping Asian Carp
programme.desc: The Green Way Outdoors team head to the pheasant capital of America, South Dakota. They hunt for pheasants and then head to the Missouri River to partake in some aerial Asian carp bowfishing!

programme.title: Operation Elk
programme.desc: September is elk season in the Rockies and the boys are in search of their biggest bulls yet.

programme.title: Crazy Rut Hunting

programme.title: Wildfire Devastation
programme.desc: Rich and Sandi talk about the wild fire on the line and show the devastation caused.

programme.title: Wood Day on the Trapline
programme.desc: It's wood day out on the trapline, and Rich and Sandi put some of the newly fire killed trees to good use. Then it’s off to check lynx and otter traps from last winter.

programme.title: The Eastern Cape of South Africa
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we're on a journey back to South Africa where we'll take a look at a variety of adventures and what goes on behind the scenes on some hunts.

programme.title: Axis Hunting and a Waterbuck Adventure in South Africa
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we're going to join Jeff Reynolds as he goes on a dream hunt for an axis buck and then we'll journey back to South Africa with Wade Middleton as he goes back into the field in search of a waterbuck.

programme.title: Hog Hunts and a Big Ten Point

programme.title: Arctic Char: Tree River Staycation - Part 2
programme.desc: After a good night’s rest in the pouring rain, we head out early up river to the famous Presidential Falls and then back onto the hunt for an Arctic Char in full spawning colors.

programme.title: Lake Trout - Great Slave Lake
programme.desc: We take in the last morning of fishing before the long 300km boat ride home to Yellowknife, NT. The fish are not done yet and we get to show you what not to do, when battling a giant lake trout to the boat!

programme.title: Shore Fishn Northern Pike
programme.desc: Its September and Ryan jumps back into the boat with Captain Andrew Moore and they head out on another personal bucket list adventure for the elusive Inconnu and some giant pike.

programme.title: Fly Fishing the Grand Cascapedia
programme.desc: This week, Pierre and his buddy Pat are in Gaspesie, Quebec for some fly fishing at the legendary Grand Cascapedia River.

programme.title: New Brunswick Moose

programme.title: Turkey Hunting

programme.title: Pure Passion Part 1 : Saskatchewan Black Bears

programme.title: Chasin' Whitetails: Manitoba Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Join Troy Esau on an exciting journey as he tracks elusive mature whitetail deer throughout the Manitoba hunting season.

programme.title: Trophy Pintails in Oregon
programme.desc: Mario and the local Oregon guys get together for a late season hunt in the Pacific NW. They pull out the layout boats for some high-water tricks to shoot some trophy Pintails and other ducks.

programme.title: Cold Weather Ducks
programme.desc: Mario heads east to a few different states and ends up in Wyoming at the Weatherby Facility for a tour. To cap things off we get to head out on the river for a very cold and snowy mallard hunt, with a small side of honkers to enjoy.

programme.title: Wild West Ducks & Nebraska Snows
programme.desc: The FA crew heads out on the famed Columbia River in Oregon to chase some birds, miles of places for the birds to hide and some incredible scenery. Then we slide into a little trip we took to Nebraska to hunt with the guys at Whiskey Sloughs.

programme.title: Passing on a Hunting Traditon
programme.desc: The Martin fathers are teaching their daughters and sons to hunt elk in the juniper country of eastern Oregon. Horses helped the family get to the high ground where elusive bulls could be found, but the ride doesn’t guarantee success

programme.title: Pend Oreille Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Pend Oreille River in northeast Washington is a waterfowl magnet and provided a perfect setting for close friends to enjoy time together in the blind. The ducks and geese keep the guys engaged between stories of days gone by

programme.title: Crazy Rut Hunting
programme.desc: November, the rut is on, and the Grigsby is home to some of the best whitetail hunting in the Midwest. Strap into your tree stand because you have to put the hours in to shoot a Booner

programme.title: Commotion
programme.desc: Brennen heads to Kansas after a couple of years of not drawing a tag. After a bunch of scouting on public land and a few non productive sits, it all comes together during a classic rut hunt over a decoy in late November

programme.title: A Trick or Two for Bass
programme.desc: Today’s destination takes Charlie up to the Land O’ Lakes area of Eastern Ontario for smallmouth bass. Charlie joins up with friend Chris McMillan as the two enjoy a day of bass fishing. The two share techniques for clear water lakes

programme.title: 100 Degree Honkers
programme.desc: Honkers", "shortDescription": "Brad guides Claudio and 3 clients to 200 snow geese on one of the best hunts he has ever been on. Jason then guides Claudio and 5 clients to 27 big Canada geese and 3 specs on a hot afternoon in early September.

programme.title: A Look Back
programme.desc: The guys look back on an unbelievable year of fishing. From offshore giants to bays, this was one action packed season.

programme.title: BC Borderland Bulls
programme.desc: Embark on BC's wilds with hunters Joe Eppele & Steven Dahn. Tracking majestic elk, witness challenges, camaraderie, & nature's beauty unfold. Join the camaraderie, witness the primal connection with nature, and live the hunt like never before

programme.title: Axis Hunting and a Waterbuck Adventure in South Africa
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we're going to join Jeff Reynolds as he goes on a dream hunt for an axis buck and then we'll journey back to South Africa with Wade Middleton as he goes back into the field in search of a waterbuck.

programme.title: Carolina Dreamin'

programme.title: The Long Game - Part 2
programme.desc: Last season in Part 1, Rochelle Partridge passed up a monster framed 8, rolling the dice in hopes that the buck could survive another year. This episode shows just what a year can do.

programme.title: The Long Game - Part 3
programme.desc: The conclusion to Rochelle's unbelievable years long hunt, and the massive reward that can come when rolling the dice.

programme.title: The Maybe Buck
programme.desc: Taylor Partridge's Excalibur crossbow hunt for a MONSTER typical whitetail. A summer's work leads to a decision on whether or not to hunt a deer that turns out to be one of the largest in Canadian Whitetail history.

programme.title: These Colours Run Deep
programme.desc: This week Marc and Bill head out to meet up with some of the guys to go after some geese.

programme.title: Fun
programme.desc: This week Marc, Amber and Lorne are out hitting some trails looking for grouse.

programme.title: Property Diversity
programme.desc: If you want a property with a little added value, seek to find the ones with a strong diversity of hunting opportunities.

programme.title: Property Financing
programme.desc: DDH Properties real estate expert Jason Rieckmann talks about the financial considerations you should be taking before you make the jump at buying your dream hunting property.

programme.title: Measure in Memories
programme.desc: Editor-in-Chief Dan Schmidt returns to his roots of shooting, what makes him happy, and explains why you should have no apologies for doing the exact same thing.

programme.title: Bed Bucks
programme.desc: The DDH team shares best practices for identifying and hunting whitetail bedding areas.

programme.title: A Time to Talk
programme.desc: Tension runs high as Dan Schmidt moderates a discussion of all things whitetail hunting between esteemed whitetail expert Dr. Stephen Ditchkoff of the Auburn University Deer Lab and famous rock star and hunting activist, Ted Nugent.

programme.title: Jason's Place
programme.desc: DDH Properties real estate expert Jason Rieckmann walks us through his own dream deer hunting property and shows us how easy it is to set up a brand new Orion hunting blind.

programme.title: Modern Heroes - Part 1
programme.desc: Treestand accidents unfortunately happen every year despite efforts of public awareness. On this episode of Modern Hunter we showcase a mock hunting accident and the modern heroes that are standing by to answer the call.

programme.title: Modern Heroes - Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of our Modern Heroes special, features the Rhinelander, Wisconsin volunteer fire department as they answer a call to save a fallen hunter.

programme.title: Off Season
programme.desc: With a last minute invite from his good friend Brad Rucks, Mark Scroggins get his opportunity in the off season at his very first trophy axis buck.

programme.title: Tennessee
programme.desc: Join Host Alexa Score as she visits some of the best off-road parks in Tennessee.

programme.title: Rugged Radios
programme.desc: Join Host Alexa Score and the team from Rugged Radios as they transform a Polaris General into a roving taco truck.

programme.title: Early Season Waterfowl in Saskatchewan
programme.desc: Chris Dorsey returns to the top of the flyway for his own annual migration as he hunts early season waterfowl in Saskatchewan with good friend Steve Hicks.

programme.title: The Ibex Slam
programme.desc: Chris Dorsey looks to complete the Ibex slam by taking the Ronda and Beceite subspecies in the mountains of southern Spain.

programme.title: Fourteen
programme.desc: After a horrible hunt in the Hill Country, Blaine spends his last day in South Texas looking for a unicorn 14-point buck.

programme.title: Best of North American Big Game Hunting
programme.desc: Kristy Titus takes you behind the scenes on a more personal level, showcasing some of her favorite North American big game hunts for moose, mountain goat, Dall sheep and mountain caribou.

programme.title: Timing is Everything
programme.desc: Join Kristy Titus for this episode of Pursue the Wild where she hunts whitetail in Missouri and Kansas.

programme.title: Cash Out Season - Oregon Steens Mule Deer
programme.desc: Kristy Titus prepares for her second mule deer hunt in the coveted Steens Mountain unit in Oregon. Join her as she cashes out her preference points and completes her final hunt as an Oregon resident.

programme.title: Pike & Smallmouth Bass
programme.desc: Casting lures for weed & structure pike and smallmouth bass.

programme.title: Trolling Walleye & Lake Trout
programme.desc: Great Lakes open-water walleye and lake trout.

programme.title: Season's Highlights
programme.desc: Jigging lake trout, walleye, top-water smallmouth bass, cranking walleye and coastal river salmon.

programme.title: A Look Back

programme.title: Going Deep in the Skinny
programme.desc: The captains take a deep look at flats fishing in Panama City, Florida.

programme.title: Florida, Meet Texas
programme.desc: Capt. Todd & Capt. Jamie take the Towee Boat on a cast & blast dream trip.

programme.title: Colorado Dream Hunt
programme.desc: A culmination of volunteers and donors come together to give our recipient the absolute hunt of a lifetime! First, we join Dustin on an intense spot n stalk hunt for an elk followed by a good old-fashioned prairie dog shoot.

programme.title: Hunting for a Giant
programme.desc: Our first hunt takes us along with our recipient Jacob whose dream of taking down a giant bull moose is about to become a reality. Then we join Brody, who is new to hunting but has the big dream of taking a big ol' trophy whitetail buck!

programme.title: One Shot Moose Kill
programme.desc: We start off with Keegan whose dream is to take a crack at one the largest animals in North America, then O.A.F. star Gabe is back for his first turkey hunt, lastly returning hunter Jamison is on a spot & stalk North Dakota elk hunt of epic portions.

programme.title: The OGs vs Newbees Hunting Competition: Week 12
programme.desc: A hunting competition featuring the Whitetail Frenzy originals aka The OGs vs a group of new staff members aka The Newbees.

programme.title: The OGs vs Newbees Hunting Competition: Week 1
programme.desc: A hunting competition featuring the Whitetail Frenzy originals aka The OGs vs a group of new staff members aka The Newbees.

programme.desc: A hunting competition featuring the Whitetail Frenzy originals aka The OGs vs a group of new staff members aka The Newbees.

programme.title: Jumbo Perch
programme.desc: Mitchell and Roger target jumbo perch through the ice, camping out over night doing a catch and cook!

programme.title: Dreams Become Reality
programme.desc: The Moment of Truth TV crew experienced some serious heart break throughout the fall, but persevered and were rewarded with a unforgettable season having their best season yet.

programme.title: Back to Back Bruins
programme.desc: Mitchell targets a beautiful black bear in the boreal forests of Alberta.

programme.title: Up to Us
programme.desc: Follow along as David takes us through an Iowa archery season, explaining why hunters do what they do.

programme.title: LOL
programme.desc: Watch as the Holder's release the humorous side of Raised Hunting. If you can't laugh at yourself, who can you laugh at? Someone else...

programme.title: Living
programme.desc: Join the Holder family as they take a look at an entire hunting season and how hunting mimics life.

programme.title: Feed the Whale
programme.desc: For the maiden voyage of the new Kingfisher Boats 3025 GFX Brendan wanted to bring on a very special guest. An expert of the ocean and everyone’s favourite 6 ton mammal, Fin the whale, official mascot of the Vancouver Canucks.

programme.title: Walters Cove Resort
programme.desc: Brendan Morrison and Dave Babych head to Kyuquot for an unforgettable trip to Walters Cove Resort, owned by the Kyuquot/Checleseht First Nations.

programme.title: Marlin for Marty
programme.desc: Legendary NHL Goaltender Marty Turco joins Brendan and Steve Rae in Cabo San Lucas for an epic day on the water.

programme.title: Mesquite
programme.desc: Texas is known for being target rich, and the boys have proven that. They shot so many bucks in October it barely fits into an episode!

programme.title: Spot & Stalk
programme.desc: It’s bear season in Alaska, and Mike has been waiting four years to get this permit. He’s got an itch to take down a big bear, and the Savage is sighted in.

programme.title: Axis Heat
programme.desc: It’s hot in Texas, but that doesn’t mean you can’t get in a good axis hunt. It doesn’t get better than walking, stalking and dropping an axis deer.

programme.title: Eye Candy
programme.desc: In the formerly male-dominated world of wrestling, a courageous woman struggles to be taken seriously as an athlete and performer.

programme.title: Not in my Backyard
programme.desc: One of the biggest taboos in society is the rehabilitation of sex offenders. This film takes the offender perspective.

programme.title: Homeopathy Unrefuted?
programme.desc: Is homeopathy a hoax or medicine? Here, homeopaths are allowed to share their very different views.

programme.title: Evil in the Woods
programme.desc: The "German indie machine" Malte Wirtz turns to horror and does it so successfully that the audience left the cinema hall in fear.

programme.title: The Gulls
programme.desc: Elza lives in a small town on the Caspian Sea. While her husband catches fish illegally, she dreams of breaking out of her small world.

programme.title: Angels of Revolution
programme.desc: Soviet heroine Polina Schneider gathers a group of avant-garde artists to convert the remote pagan tribes of Siberia to communism.

programme.title: Heiko's World
programme.desc: From YouTube to the cinemas: In this loving homage to Berlin's pub culture, Berlin original Heiko must win a darts tournament.

programme.title: Gender Crisis
programme.desc: Samson and Delilah: The Old Testament story of a man with irrepressible strength - as a silent film, told in a modern way.

programme.title: Motorcity
programme.desc: A compelling exploration of the complexities of American life, history, and society through the lens of the unique and fascinating sport drag racing.

programme.title: Stories from the Sea
programme.desc: This documentary portrays women who embark on a sea voyage thus challenging traditional gender roles just by being there.

programme.title: Johanna Dohnal - Visionary of Feminism
programme.desc: Johanna Dohnal, icon of the Austrian women's movement and first Minister for Women's Affairs, shaped the Alpine Republic like hardly any other.

programme.title: Home Game
programme.desc: Hometowns, neighborhoods, community spirit, energy security and a lot of money are at stake here.

programme.title: Gisela
programme.desc: Authentic, haphazard and unromantic, three residents of a high-rise housing estate search for love, friendship and sexuality.

programme.title: I Knew You Were My Kind
programme.desc: I Knew You Were My Kind

programme.title: The Smoothness of Our Teeth
programme.desc: A family visit and a broken tooth raises universal questions about identity, origins and life choices.

programme.title: Stained Skin
programme.desc: Despite the adverse working conditions, two friends persevere with the power of their imagination and their will.

programme.title: Atlas
programme.desc: A simple worker gets caught up in the maelstrom of real estate sharks, evictions and clan crime, where humanity often gives way to greed.

programme.title: Kick It Like a Girl
programme.desc: The Team - Harmony and team spirit are very important to the SGS girls' team. But the four protagonists have also experienced discrimination and even violence.

programme.title: Holy Island
programme.desc: Rosa and David, two lost souls, try to escape purgatory. But only one of them can be saved in the end.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Rebecca Snipe returns to North Fork after an extended visit. Lucas' son Mark is smitten and plans to play matchmaker for his dad. However, the Snipe brothers get involved to make sure Lucas is good enough for Rebecca.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Wealthy Frenchman Cesar Tiffauges, who is used to getting whatever he desires, wants to buy the McCain Ranch. Tiffauges, a sadistic man, abuses his followers regularly with beatings. When Lucas refuses, his son Mark becomes the object of cruelty.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, two men have their getaway plan go wrong. When one bandit takes their one remaining horse and rides off with the gold, the other is captured. Years later, the two men face off in a deadly game of deceit and revenge.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben, Hoss and Joe decide to visit San Francisco with some of their ranch hands. The hands vanish into the crowds and while searching for them, Ben finds himself shanghaied and on a ship destined for Hong Kong.

programme.title: Legal Action
programme.desc: Big-city lawyer Casey McKay, (Eric Close - Nashville, Without a Trace) a winner with a long hot streak, didn't expect the mysterious text from his ex-wife, Pru, (Tanya Clarke - A Beautiful Mind, Guiding Light) about her brother, Jay. No stranger to being on the wrong side of the law, Jay is accused of murdering a District Attorney. Casey takes the case, but soon discovers this will be no ordinary legal defense. Teaming up with eccentric ex-marine turned motel owner and P.I. "Ex" Clemens, (Nick Searcy - Justified, The Shape of Water) he discovers a web of conspiracy that puts him face-to-face with the town's most greedy and corrupt land developer, Mr. Gates (Tommy Flanagan - Sons of Anarchy, Braveheart). As Casey begins to unravel the truth, he finds himself fighting for his former brother-in-law's life, as well as his own.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss becomes friends with a man named Arnie. Arnie doesn't realize his own strength and has never learned to control his temper. When a local saloon girl toys with his affections, Arnie becomes dangerous.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Todd Grayson arrives in town and is told that Ben Cartwright had killed his father. Ben shot Luke Grayson in self-defense, but Todd won't accept the truth. He wants to avenge his father by killing Ben.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Under orders from President Jefferson to explore America's vast unknown frontier, Meriwether Lewis and William Clark lead an expedition up the Missouri River in an attempt to reach the Pacific Ocean...a journey no American has made before, and one that may not even be possible. Leaving Fort Mandan after their first winter on the frontier, the Corps of Discovery enters completely uncharted territory. But as the waterways they travel become too shallow for boats, Lewis and Clark desperately seek the Shoshone tribe and their horses. To communicate with the elusive tribe, they rely on Sacagawea, a 16-year-old Shoshone woman, who accompanies the expedition with her newborn son. Lewis and Clark hope Sacagawea will help them trade for the Shoshone's horses, which will provide the only means of crossing the forbidding Rocky Mountains before winter returns.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: When an elusive bandito terrorizes early Los Angeles County, an eager reporter shadows the sheriff who is hunting the dangerous outlaw. Will the reporter stay objective or take matters into his own hands when he comes face to face with the killer?

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bronco Bill and his gang are robbing trains at will, two veteran lawmen join forces to stop the violent outlaws once and for all. Years later, gunfighter-turned-reporter Bat Masterson hears the story from the last surviving member of the gang.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is the interim sheriff for the town of Gunnison. He quickly learns that his old friend Ray Masters wants revenge on Rod Delaplane due to a previous debt. Cheyenne must go to extreme measures to avoid tragedy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Rebecca Snipe returns to North Fork after an extended visit. Lucas' son Mark is smitten and plans to play matchmaker for his dad. However, the Snipe brothers get involved to make sure Lucas is good enough for Rebecca.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Wealthy Frenchman Cesar Tiffauges, who is used to getting whatever he desires, wants to buy the McCain Ranch. Tiffauges, a sadistic man, abuses his followers regularly with beatings. When Lucas refuses, his son Mark becomes the object of cruelty.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, two men have their getaway plan go wrong. When one bandit takes their one remaining horse and rides off with the gold, the other is captured. Years later, the two men face off in a deadly game of deceit and revenge.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben, Hoss and Joe decide to visit San Francisco with some of their ranch hands. The hands vanish into the crowds and while searching for them, Ben finds himself shanghaied and on a ship destined for Hong Kong.

programme.title: Far Haven
programme.desc: In 1887, Hunter Braddock moves back to Far Haven, Arizona to start over with his two young children, but when his father-in-law is brutally attacked he must take on the corrupt forces strangling the town in order to protect what he loves most.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: Jimmy falls in love with a young woman, not realizing that she is married. He finds himself framed for a murder by the woman. The Kid and Lou come to Jimmy's aid, proving that he is innocent of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas has a disdain for Oat Jackford since years ago he burned down his ranch to get him off property he wanted. When hired killer Tom King arrives in North Fork and is on Oat's trail, Lucas decides to side with and help the man he once hated.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A trail bum rides into North Fork during one of the worst droughts in years. He claims that he can bring rain to their town. Many believe that he's a water witcher, but a railroad boss resents his intrusion and wants him gone.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: For months, a thin wall of rock is all that keeps the peace between two rival silver mining companies 300 feet below the Idaho desert. When the barrier is finally breached, pickaxes give way to pistols and rifles, and the miners battle for five days.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After the suspicious death of a tunnel worker, and unconvincing answers from the project's lead engineer, Doc Susie goes on a covert mission to find out what happened. Deep underground, she finds her own life in peril when she's trapped by a cave-in.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher hires Cheyenne as a ranch foreman. Shortly after he begins his duties, his friend falls in love with the boss' beautiful daughter. However, the rancher has other plans, as his sights are set on Cheyenne to become his new son-in-law.

programme.title: The Proud Rebel
programme.desc: A Confederate veteran battles prejudice and greed as he helps a woman save her ranch from a land grab, while searching for a cure for his mute son.

programme.title: Black Fox
programme.desc: A former slave and his white blood brother have moved their families from the Carolinas to Texas. When the Civil War begins, their settlement is left unprotected from hostile Indian tribes and the former slave may be the only hope for peace.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: When a former Army officer accidentally kills a woman's young son, he offers to escort the grieving mother through dangerous Indian territory on the way to lay the boy to rest at the family homestead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Kansas Sawyer is Lucas' friend who was cheated in a horse-trading deal. Lucas investigates Colonel Bourbon's operation and discovers his illegal process. He also learns that the horse Sawyer bought was stolen and is being sought after by outlaws.

programme.title: Far Haven
programme.desc: In 1887, Hunter Braddock moves back to Far Haven, Arizona to start over with his two young children, but when his father-in-law is brutally attacked he must take on the corrupt forces strangling the town in order to protect what he loves most.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: When a former Army officer accidentally kills a woman's young son, he offers to escort the grieving mother through dangerous Indian territory on the way to lay the boy to rest at the family homestead.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Booger and Cody struggle to pen two bulls in need of a veterinary check-up. Cody gets soaked when he fails to heed Booger's prediction of a rainstorm, sparking Booger to try his hand at delivering the local weather forecast. Bubba decides to accept the job with his father-in-law in Mississippi and he makes a handmade gift for Cody and Booger to soften the blow when he breaks the news to them. The trio takes on one last big job to benefit a neighbor in need. Bubba and Kaley host a final cookout before they pack up and leave for Mississippi.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: It's time for the cowboys to ride into new pastures as they explore growing their cattle business in unexpected ways. Bubba has been making good money working for his father-in-law's company in Mississippi, but he realizes he'd rather be out of his office chair and back on his horse in Alabama. Cody is excited to be managing a big rodeo, but a steer mishap puts the future of his contract on the ropes. And, even though Booger has happily saddled up with Jaclyn, it's unfamiliar terrain for him when she starts adding a woman's touch to his bachelor pad. As the three cowboys get together to sort yearlings for a friend, they devise a plan for making BBQ sauce to expand their cooking skills and company.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old man named Sam Gibbs comes to North Fork in need of Marshal Micah Torrance's protection from criminals who are after him. Sam happens to be Mark's grandfather and Lucas' deceased wife's father. Lucas finds peace with his past and helps Sam.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Jackman clan must sell their farm to pay back taxes. The Jackmans were not much at farming so they move to a nearby town and take jobs as peace officers. When bank robbers confront them, Lucas must step in and help them deal with the outlaws.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, two men have their getaway plan go wrong. When one bandit takes their one remaining horse and rides off with the gold, the other is captured. Years later, the two men face off in a deadly game of deceit and revenge.

programme.title: Buffalo Keepers
programme.desc: Today, the buffalo is the quintessential symbol of strength, freedom, and the unspoiled American West. But in the late 1800s, the nation's buffalo were nearly wiped out by ruthless hide hunters. Those majestic herds, which once numbered in the tens of millions, were down to less than 500 animals. This is the story of the handful of determined men and women who mobilized to save the ones that were left in a last-ditch effort to stave off extinction. Ranchers like Charles and Mary Ann Goodnight rescued orphaned buffalo calves and built small herds. Former buffalo hunters like Buffalo Bill helped build public sympathy. And politicians like Theodore Roosevelt helped pass laws to protect the remaining animals. The effort would be a generational one, with buffalo herds carefully tended, bred, and passed down to new stewards when their old protectors passed away. Thanks to their efforts, there are an estimated 500,000 buffalo thundering across America's grasslands once again.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne teams up with Joe Baker to travel south of the border to wrangle wild mustangs. When Joe falls ill, a financial backer and his wife step in to join Cheyenne on the dangerous venture, fighting off renegade Indians along the way.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Amarillo Ames asks Cheyenne to help drive a herd of cattle to Dodge City and take over the mission if he perishes. When Ames dies, Cheyenne must forcefully take on the Laverson brothers, who do not want him in charge of the drive.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Little Joe and Hoss spend an evening at the carnival, Little Joe's date, Jennifer Beale, disappears. The carnival owner has an eye for pretty girls and intrigues Jennifer. She learns that the attraction could prove fatal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark travel to a nearby town to sell a bull. While in town, they buy two horses from Mr. Schneider, a man in a hurry. When a posse stops Lucas and Mark on the way home, Lucas learns the horses were stolen. The men want Lucas to hang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Clarence Bibs, a simple-minded man, fancies himself as a gunfighter. While practicing, he falls and his gun fires, killing a famous gunslinger. The man's partner comes to town wanting revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark go on a hunting trip and soon become witnesses to a robbery and murder. Lucas subdues the two robbers, but is severely wounded in the process. Lucas struggles to get the robbers to justice, but devises a plan just in the nick of time.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas serves as a jury foreman when a Mescalero Apache Indian is found guilty of murder and is hanged. A Mescalero medicine man places a curse on Lucas. At first Lucas brushes it off, then unusual events begin to happen including a ghost stallion.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Booger and Cody struggle to pen two bulls in need of a veterinary check-up. Cody gets soaked when he fails to heed Booger's prediction of a rainstorm, sparking Booger to try his hand at delivering the local weather forecast. Bubba decides to accept the job with his father-in-law in Mississippi and he makes a handmade gift for Cody and Booger to soften the blow when he breaks the news to them. The trio takes on one last big job to benefit a neighbor in need. Bubba and Kaley host a final cookout before they pack up and leave for Mississippi.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: It's time for the cowboys to ride into new pastures as they explore growing their cattle business in unexpected ways. Bubba has been making good money working for his father-in-law's company in Mississippi, but he realizes he'd rather be out of his office chair and back on his horse in Alabama. Cody is excited to be managing a big rodeo, but a steer mishap puts the future of his contract on the ropes. And, even though Booger has happily saddled up with Jaclyn, it's unfamiliar terrain for him when she starts adding a woman's touch to his bachelor pad. As the three cowboys get together to sort yearlings for a friend, they devise a plan for making BBQ sauce to expand their cooking skills and company.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old man named Sam Gibbs comes to North Fork in need of Marshal Micah Torrance's protection from criminals who are after him. Sam happens to be Mark's grandfather and Lucas' deceased wife's father. Lucas finds peace with his past and helps Sam.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Clarence Bibs, a simple-minded man, fancies himself as a gunfighter. While practicing, he falls and his gun fires, killing a famous gunslinger. The man's partner comes to town wanting revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark go on a hunting trip and soon become witnesses to a robbery and murder. Lucas subdues the two robbers, but is severely wounded in the process. Lucas struggles to get the robbers to justice, but devises a plan just in the nick of time.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas serves as a jury foreman when a Mescalero Apache Indian is found guilty of murder and is hanged. A Mescalero medicine man places a curse on Lucas. At first Lucas brushes it off, then unusual events begin to happen including a ghost stallion.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Booger and Cody team up to pen a herd of cattle, but a stubborn cow takes refuge in a fishing hole, requiring some creative wrangling. The stress of maintaining a long-distance relationship leads Bubba and Kaley to move back to Alabama for good. Booger embraces his new role as a family man and enlists young Matthew to help surprise Jaclyn with a much needed home-improvement project. Cody helps Misty throw a beef-tasting party for potential buyers. As the guys ponder using their cowboy skills to open a steak house, they decide to get some on-the-job training by working a shift during the hectic dinner rush at a local eatery.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Bubba's back in the saddle with the guys when his horse bucks and throws him on a bone-breaking fall, fractures his cowboy spirit and immobilizes his work with the cattle company. Booger enlists a bullfighter to help him wrangle his ornery Brahman cattle, and considers whether or not he has enough land to maintain the growing herd. Misty gives Cody a gift from the heart that captures both their past as a couple and honors their growing family legacy as ranchers. The guys pitch each other competing ideas for their future steakhouse, and Cody's brainstorm stands out as the one with true cowboy vision - including a name for their venture.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Old Tony, an irritable old recluse, has a reputation in North Fork as being a mean hermit. When Mark and his girlfriend, Lorrie, look for arrowheads on his land, they become trapped in quicksand. Tony shows his good-hearted nature and rescues them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain and his son, Mark, arrive in North Fork to purchase a ranch. When Lucas enters a turkey shoot to win money for a down payment, he soon finds himself at odds with town villain Jim Lewis.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: A singing Mountie comes to Fort Courage looking for Agarn's look-alike Canadian cousin, Lucky Pierre Agarniere, a fur trapper accused of stealing furs. Agarn tries to clear his cousin's name and uncover the truth.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: When Major Bradley visits Fort Courage the F Troop learns that they all will be transferred, except for Corporal Agarn, who must stay and train the G Troop. Agarn quickly finds out the new troops are more incompetent than his comrades in F Troop.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: When Elijah Briant is elected sheriff, the mild-mannered druggist and former teacher tries to enforce the law without carrying a weapon. But he soon faces his greatest challenge when the last surviving members of the Wild Bunch descend on his town.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: When an elusive bandito terrorizes early Los Angeles County, an eager reporter shadows the sheriff who is hunting the dangerous outlaw. Will the reporter stay objective or take matters into his own hands when he comes face to face with the killer?

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Already a seasoned mountain man, Joe Meek has a reputation for raw courage and bravery among the trappers of the west. But Meek becomes a frontier legend when he risks his life in a fearless charge to save the woman that he loves from Crow warriors.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: After his overturned conviction, a gunslinger named Randle seeks the men who testified against him and put him in jail. Meanwhile, Teaspoon's ex-wife, Polly, comes to Rock Creek to buy a saloon, but unfortunately becomes Randle's focus.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Mine owners in Stagge City instigate a corrupt sheriff to falsely arrest travelers, including Cheyenne, on the charge of vagrancy. Sentenced to 90 days of hard labor in the nearby Stagge Silver Mine, Cheyenne plans his escape.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne escorts a bride on a train ride while transporting $5000 for his boss. A friend informs him that a gang of young bandits plans to rob the train. Cheyenne finds out that their goal includes more than robbery.

programme.title: Breed of Violence
programme.desc: Little Joe's friend, Dolly Kincaid, daughter of the town sheriff, is always falling in with the wrong kind. She becomes involved with Vince Dagen and soon finds out he is an outlaw. It's up to Joe to try and save her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A brutal snowstorm makes the roads impassable and forces a stagecoach to stop at the McCain Ranch. Lucas gives the passengers shelter, but little does he know a dance hall girl, a drunk, and a famous gunslinger are his guests.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Brothers Charv and Kelly Banner play a joke on Lucas that soon gets out of hand when they contact a St. Louis marriage bureau to send a possible bride for Lucas. Mary Woodson arrives in North Fork ready for marriage, but Lucas wants no part of it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find a wounded man and bring him into North Fork to save his life. Lucas asks Simon Battle, a gunfighter-turned-doctor, to help the man. The wounded man's enemies have other plans in store.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man named Wang Chi and his son, Wang Lee, come to North Fork to open a laundry service in town. Vince Fergus, a prejudiced man, bullies them but Micah, Lucas, and Milly try to convince them to stay. A fight between Fergus and Lucas ensues.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Booger and Cody team up to pen a herd of cattle, but a stubborn cow takes refuge in a fishing hole, requiring some creative wrangling. The stress of maintaining a long-distance relationship leads Bubba and Kaley to move back to Alabama for good. programme.desc: Cheyenne escorts a bride on a train ride while transporting $5000 for his boss. A friend informs him that a gang of young bandits plans to rob the train. Cheyenne finds out that their goal includes more than robbery.

programme.title: Breed of Violence
programme.desc: Little Joe's friend, Dolly Kincaid, daughter of the town sheriff, is always falling in with the wrong kind. She becomes involved with Vince Dagen and soon finds out he is an outlaw. It's up to Joe to try and save her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A brutal snowstorm makes the roads impassable and forces a stagecoach to stop at the McCain Ranch. Lucas gives the passengers shelter, but little does he know a dance hall girl, a drunk, and a famous gunslinger are his guests.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Brothers Charv and Kelly Banner play a joke on Lucas that soon gets out of hand when they contact a St. Louis marriage bureau to send a possible bride for Lucas. Mary Woodson arrives in North Fork ready for marriage, but Lucas wants no part of it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find a wounded man and bring him into North Fork to save his life. Lucas asks Simon Battle, a gunfighter-turned-doctor, to help the man. The wounded man's enemies have other plans in store.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man named Wang Chi and his son, Wang Lee, come to North Fork to open a laundry service in town. Vince Fergus, a prejudiced man, bullies them but Micah, Lucas, and Milly try to convince them to stay. A fight between Fergus and Lucas ensues.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: Bubba's in a pinch when Cody urges him to ease his aching back with acupuncture. Cody and Misty have to find out why their herd is losing so many stillborn calves before it threatens their new business. Booger discovers the ups and downs of daddy duty when he takes care of Matthew for the day. He draws on the bonding time he had with his own grandfather to make a special new memory. The cowboys put their steakhouse dreams on the line to recruit a business partner and are confronted with their next steps: developing a full menu and creating a pop-up restaurant.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The cowboys are more at home on the range than behind a desk, so when lost paperwork results in lost income, they agree that they need to lasso in some secretarial help. Bubba's back injury might keep him out of the saddle, but nothing can stop him from galloping ahead with making Andie's first birthday unforgettable with a secret surprise. Booger jumps at the chance to rebuild his family legacy by buying back his granddaddy's land, but is discouraged when his high-emotion offer is too low for the sellers. While Cody is eager to wow potential restaurant partners, his black-eyed peas - and just about everything else the guys dish up - get a big thumbs down from two chefs, threatening their plans for a pop-up steakhouse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas buys his ranch, hired hands of a wealthy cattleman demand he leave. When Lucas refuses, the men beat him, drag him, and then they burn his ranch house to the ground. Lucas tracks these men down and confronts their boss, Oat Jackford.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A young outlaw named Will Fulton saves Mark's life but breaks a leg in the process. He mends at Lucas' ranch, and there meets the lovely Ann Bard. The outlaw begins to soften and reassesses his choices and path in life.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: Captain Parmenter receives an urgent message that Prussian Colonel Heindrich von Zeppel is arriving to train the men of F Troop as balloonists in warfare. Agarn is skeptical but O'Rourke sees an opportunity to make a profit.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: F Troop becomes a victim of a payroll robbery when bandits rob a train carrying Fort Courage's money. To protect the next payroll train, Agarn and O'Rourke volunteer to guard the payload. Impending danger awaits as the bandits are known killers.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bronco Bill and his gang are robbing trains at will, two veteran lawmen join forces to stop the violent outlaws once and for all. Years later, gunfighter-turned-reporter Bat Masterson hears the story from the last surviving member of the gang.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After being sworn in as one of Oklahoma's first female deputy marshals, Ada Curnutt volunteers to track down two killers-turned-counterfeiters and concocts a cunning plan to bring them to justice without using a gun.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Jim Beckwourth lives a life of adventure as a trapper, trader and adopted member of the Crow tribe. When America goes to war, Beckwourth becomes an army dispatch rider, a job that puts him and a young greenhorn on a collision course with the Pawnee.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: A new rider named Matt trains to replace Lou when she gets married. However, when the new rider disappears on his first ride, Jimmy and Lou go after him. Jimmy soon discovers that the Garrett brothers are responsible for Matt's demise.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is on the run from the law for a crime that he did not commit in Lone Butte. To clear his name, he must infiltrate the Ellwood Gang to find the killer. His only clues are the killer's hideout and unusual belt buckle.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: A frustrated Army post commander court-martials Cheyenne for cowardice after he abandons a herd of needed Army horses. The commander wants answers and orders Cheyenne to take them to a desolate cavalry base used during enemy strikes.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Gunnar Borgstrom stops to visit his relatives, the Cartwrights, on his way to Canada. Gunnar is hiding a dark secret and when little Joe's life is put in danger, the only way to save him is for Gunnar to come clean.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mexican bandits attack Lucas and Mark for crossing their desert without paying. The group steals their horses, kidnaps Mark, and leaves Lucas to die in the desert. Lucas gets free and trails the banditos to a small village.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Against Lucas' wishes, Mark gets a job at the livery stable in town. Lucas has doubts that Mark can both work and get his chores done on time. Mark finds himself in trouble when he takes a shortcut on an errand and meets a dangerous bank robber.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas stands guard at the North Fork Bank when $50,000 arrives in a specially designed stagecoach strongbox. Two gunmem who plan to ambush and rob the stage take Milly and Mark hostage in the general store, which doubles as their headquarters.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two prison wagon drivers stop at the McCain Ranch looking for whiskey. Lucas refuses since they are taking a murderer named Rudy Croft to be hanged in Yuma. Later, Croft escapes and the guards take Lucas as their prisoner.

programme.desc: Two prison wagon drivers stop at the McCain Ranch looking for whiskey. Lucas refuses since they are taking a murderer named Rudy Croft to be hanged in Yuma. Later, Croft escapes and the guards take Lucas as their prisoner.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The cowboys team up to wrangle dangerous long-horned cattle for a fellow rancher. Working with Bubba's feisty new colt, Booger schools his over-confident apprentice on the skills of training horses. The steakhouse plans gallop ahead with the cowboys taking lessons to learn more about the industry. Cody polishes his etiquette and studies the proper way to set a table, Bubba becomes Chef Thompson after a professional cook turns up the heat in the kitchen, and Booger partners with a butcher to sharpen his knowledge of beef. When their equipment fails, Cody and Misty unload new cow pens the old-fashioned way. When he gets the okay from his chiropractor, a relieved Bubba jumps back on his horse and rides off into the sunset with Kaley.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The cowboys team up to get their new herd feed-broke, but a stuck truck means super-mom, super-secretary Kaley has to save the day. Horse expert Booger teaches a young polo player how to ride western style, but after she challenges him to join her on the polo field, who's really getting schooled? Bubba and Kaley anxiously wait to share their daughter's first steps. To get more family time, Cody and Misty do a drive-thru date on horseback, and he clears the family fishing hole to lift his ailing Paw-Paw's spirits. And, after their crash course in cooking, one final taste test determines if Chef Bill will partner up with the cowboys to keep their restaurant dreams alive. They present their best dishes to some of the toughest critics they'll ever meet: their wives.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Micah Torrance, formerly a famous marshal, who is now a drunk crippled from a gunfight, stumbles into North Fork. Lucas McCain hires him in hopes of rehabilitating the man. The good deed quickly backfires when outlaws arrive.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's uncle, Johnny Gibb, a famous rodeo rider, comes to visit. Mark idolizes his uncle, but Lucas soon discovers that Johnny is on the run from the law after robbing an express office, and is afraid that Johnny is a bad influence on young Mark.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: Corporal Agarn experiences amnesia after falling from a horse. After seeing his condition, a phony traveling medicine man tries to frame Agarn for his own robberies. O'Rourke seeks help from an Indian detective to clear him.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: O'Rourke sees another money-making opportunity on the horizon and employs Agarn and two other troops to homestead a ghost town named Paradise Junction. Their plan centers around revitalizing the town with hopes the railroad will soon pass through.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After a man murders his wife in a jealous rage and goes on the run, local lawmen are stunned when legendary Marshal Bass Reeves accepts responsibility for bringing the killer to justice...because the murderer is none other than Reeves' own son.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Under siege by gunslingers, the gold mining town of Yankee Hill runs a newspaper advertisement to find a new marshal. Former slave and Union soldier Willie Kennard answers the ad, but he faces prejudice and doubt as he works to restore law and order.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Heading west as a young adventurer, greenhorn Jim Baker quickly develops a reputation as a skilled marksman and mountain man. When a party of trappers is surrounded and attacked by Cheyenne and Arapaho warriors, Baker proves that he is also a leader.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: The Kid and Lou's special day is approaching, and the riders prepare for the couple's upcoming wedding. Teaspoon is upset over when the Army arrives in Rock Creek to recruit young men as scouts. Meanwhile, the townspeople brace for the Civil War.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: While out on an Army mission, Cheyenne shoots a miner in self-defense. He stays to help the miner and his wife, but dangers loom when the Sioux arrive. Their sights are on the miner's wife and his gold.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: While Cheyenne works for Charley Dolan, he finds himself in the middle of a battle between Dolan and Len Garth, a gang leader who forces Dolan and others off their land. Garth soon burns the newspaper office, but Dolan aims to rebuild.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben hires Sam Jackson to help on a cattle drive. Jackson is really Outlaw Johnny Logan. Johnny signed for the drive since it was going near the town of Waycross, where he plans to kill the Waycross sheriff, who is his father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark takes a job on new neighbor Will Temple's ranch but is taken back by Temple's badly scarred face. When a cavalry officer stops by the McCain Ranch looking for a deserter who committed murder, both Mark and Lucas question who Temple really is.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While repairing a fence on his property, Lucas witnesses a murder. The killer, Corey Hazlett, is the son of a wealthy rancher named Frank Hazlett. When Lucas agrees to testify at Corey's trial, there are threats to harm Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two old friends of Lucas', Don Chumera De Lardo and Colonel Black, come to the McCain Ranch. They are there to finish a deed of honor, even insisting on a jousting match. Lucas learns that the feud started over a chess game.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A neighbor of Lucas' believes he is Abe Lincoln after being mentally injured in the Civil War. Townspeople go along with his impersonation since he is a kind man. However, when a saloon patron makes fun of him, trouble ensues.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The cowboys team up to wrangle dangerous long-horned cattle for a fellow rancher. Working with Bubba's feisty new colt, Booger schools his over-confident apprentice on the skills of training horses. The steakhouse plans gallop ahead with the cowboys taking lessons to learn more about the industry. Cody polishes his etiquette and studies the proper way to set a table, Bubba becomes Chef Thompson after a professional cook turns up the heat in the kitchen, and Booger partners with a butcher to sharpen his knowledge of beef. When their equipment fails, Cody and Misty unload new cow pens the old-fashioned way. When he gets the okay from his chiropractor, a relieved Bubba jumps back on his horse and rides off into the sunset with Kaley.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The cowboys team up to get their new herd feed-broke, but a stuck truck means super-mom, super-secretary Kaley has to save the day. Horse expert Booger teaches a young polo player how to ride western style, but after she challenges him to join her on the polo field, who's really getting schooled? Bubba and Kaley anxiously wait to share their daughter's first steps. To get more family time, Cody and Misty do a drive-thru date on horseback, and he clears the family fishing hole to lift his ailing Paw-Paw's spirits. They present their best dishes to some of the toughest critics they'll ever meet: their wives.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark takes a job on new neighbor Will Temple's ranch but is taken back by Temple's badly scarred face. When a cavalry officer stops by the McCain Ranch looking for a deserter who committed murder, both Mark and Lucas question who Temple really is.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While repairing a fence on his property, Lucas witnesses a murder. The killer, Corey Hazlett, is the son of a wealthy rancher named Frank Hazlett. When Lucas agrees to testify at Corey's trial, there are threats to harm Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two old friends of Lucas', Don Chumera De Lardo and Colonel Black, come to the McCain Ranch. They are there to finish a deed of honor, even insisting on a jousting match. Lucas learns that the feud started over a chess game.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A neighbor of Lucas' believes he is Abe Lincoln after being mentally injured in the Civil War. Townspeople go along with his impersonation since he is a kind man. However, when a saloon patron makes fun of him, trouble ensues.

programme.title: Blue Ridge
programme.desc: Ex-Green Beret, Justin Wise, trades in his life of danger for a sheriff badge in a sleepy town at the heart of the Blue Ridge Mountains. Now closer to his ex-wife and daughter, he's ready to settle down and embrace a life without chaos. But trouble has a way of following him. Just when he starts getting adjusted to the simple life, a murder in the community puts the residents on edge and refuels a longtime feud between two of the most powerful families. As Justin and his deputies work the case, he realizes there is more to his new home than meets the eye. Secrets unfold, and motives emerge, leading Justin on a race against time to solve the case before the townspeople take the law into their own hands.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corrupt Judge Burton seeks justice against those who are responsible for the hanging of his son, including Lucas McCain, who caught him. When Burton discovers that Lucas has a son, he captures Lucas to make him watch Mark suffer the same punishment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Italian Count Alfredo Di Montova comes to North Fork. His unique clothing attracts the attention of town bully Sim Groder. When Groder pushes the count too far, Montova initiates a duel, and asks Lucas to assist with the rules.

programme.title: Freedom on the Range
programme.desc: From brave lawmen to rugged cowboys, discover the untold stories of African Americans' cultural significance in the Old West.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: When outlaw John Wesley Hardin murders a sheriff, a hard-charging Texas Ranger joins forces with a cool-headed police detective to hunt the killer. The unlikely duo must learn how to work together to end Hardin's reign of terror once and for all.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Chinese immigrant Wong Fee Lee joins a convoy of miners headed to Deadwood, where he hopes to strike gold and start a business. But when the Black Hills Bandits stand in their way, Wong must find the strength to lead his fellow prospectors in battle.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Having explored the frontier with his good friend Kit Carson, Lucien Maxwell is eager to settle down with his family. But before he can establish a ranching empire in New Mexico, Maxwell must first survive a deadly clash with the Jicarilla Apache.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: The Kid and Lou's wedding day arrives. The advancement of the Civil War forces the riders to take sides. Jesse must choose between his brother Frank or his friends in the Pony Express. An encounter with renegade rebels ends in tragedy.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben, Hoss and Joe decide to visit San Francisco with some of their ranch hands. The hands vanish into the crowds and while searching for them, Ben finds himself shanghaied and on a ship destined for Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Warrant
programme.desc: Sheriff John Breaker and his son, Cal, reunite after the Civil War to track down a fellow veteran, now a notorious gang leader. Their mission turns dangerous when they find themselves caught between their former friend's outlaw gang and the vigilantes who are taking the law into their own hands. Starring Neal McDonough (Yellowstone, Captain America), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers, Tarzan), Steven R. McQueen (The Vampire Diaries, Chicago Fire), and Annabeth Gish (X-Files, The Haunting of Hill House).

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: In the middle of the night, a group of wayward yearlings ends up on a city baseball field, and the county sheriff asks the guys to help get them roped. Bubba's father-in-law offers him an office job, but taking the position would require him to leave the ranch in Alabama and move to neighboring Mississippi. Cody worries that he is running out of room for his growing family, forcing him to consider a new house. And, Booger gives a few lessons to a young boy who wants to learn about the cowboy way of life.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: A shipment from Faith Cattle Company is in jeopardy when the truck gets stuck in a ditch. It's a race against the clock to get the cattle to the buyer or risk losing the deal. Bubba teams up with his father-in-law to build a custom grill prototype in hopes of launching a new business venture. Cody decides to sell a horse to help fund his dream home, but he receives an offer that is less than ideal. After getting relationship advice from Bubba and Cody, Booger ends up on a date with his best friend Ashley.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas and Mark catch two young men stealing a horse, Lucas is forced into a shootout. He captures one of the men, but Ma Boyle's son is killed in the gunfight. Soon after the killing, the Boyle clan comes to hang the person responsible.

programme.title: Blue Ridge
programme.desc: Ex-Green Beret, Justin Wise, trades in his life of danger for a sheriff badge in a sleepy town at the heart of the Blue Ridge Mountains. Starring Neal McDonough (Yellowstone, Captain America), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers, Tarzan), Steven R. McQueen (The Vampire Diaries, Chicago Fire), and Annabeth Gish (X-Files, The Haunting of Hill House).

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: In the middle of the night, a group of wayward yearlings ends up on a city baseball field, and the county sheriff asks the guys to help get them roped. Bubba's father-in-law offers him an office job, but taking the position would require him to leave the ranch in Alabama and move to neighboring Mississippi. Bubba teams up with his father-in-law to build a custom grill prototype in hopes of launching a new business venture. Cody decides to sell a horse to help fund his dream home, but he receives an offer that is less than ideal. After getting relationship advice from Bubba and Cody, Booger ends up on a date with his best friend Ashley.

programme.title: County Line
programme.desc: When his best friend, Sheriff Clint Thorne (Jeff Fahey, Texas Rising, Justified), is brutally gunned down, former neighboring county sheriff, Alden Rockwell (Tom Wopat, The Dukes Of Hazzard, Longmire) is left with many questions and no answers. After the investigation stalls and his replacement, Sheriff Preston (Grant Goodeve, Eight is Enough, Dynasty) turns a blind eye, Alden takes the case into his own hands. Uncovering a web of crime, deceit, and corruption that spreads through two counties, Alden is caught in a deadly criminal network with no backup, no badge, and local diner owner, Maddie (Patricia Richardson, Home Improvement, The West Wing) as his only ally. Seeking justice at any cost, Alden must find out who's behind this criminal enterprise, even if some lines must be crossed.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe and Hoss travel to Sacramento to visit Helen, the widow of Ben's friend, Josh Layton. Hoss falls in love with her and intends to marry her. All are thrilled except Adam, who has reason to believe that she is using Hoss.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe finds a man burning Ponderosa land and shoots him in self-defense. Joe is left with the responsibility of the man's daughter. He brings her to the Ponderosa, unaware of her outlaw kin searching for her.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Though Andrew Henry has little experience when he partners in a trapping expedition, he pledges his word to complete the risky venture. As Blackfeet warriors close in, he must weigh his personal integrity against the lives of the men he leads.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After being sworn in as one of Oklahoma's first female deputy marshals, Ada Curnutt volunteers to track down two killers-turned-counterfeiters and concocts a cunning plan to bring them to justice without using a gun.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: After a man murders his wife in a jealous rage and goes on the run, local lawmen are stunned when legendary Marshal Bass Reeves accepts responsibility for bringing the killer to justice...because the murderer is none other than Reeves' own son.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Scout Johnny Brassbuttons leads a wagon train, including a widow and her companion, to meet a stagecoach in Globe. Although they have permission to travel through Apache land, disaster strikes when Indians ambush them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Willard fills in as deputy while Marshal Micah Torrance is away on business. Meanwhile, Texas cowhands come to town looking for fun and relaxation. When Dan tries to prove that his toughness, those actions backfire.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark, returning after selling their herd, share the stagecoach trip with a marshal and his prisoner, Johnny Cotton. Johnny's gang stops and robs the stagecoach, while Johnny steals Lucas' gun and profits. Lucas is forced to track him down.

programme.title: Yuma
programme.desc: When a tough, veteran United States marshal is sent to clean up a down-and-dirty Western town, he faces a scheme to remove his authority and ruin his reputation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A brutal snowstorm makes the roads impassable and forces a stagecoach to stop at the McCain Ranch. Lucas gives the passengers shelter, but little does he know a dance hall girl, a drunk, and a famous gunslinger are his guests.

programme.title: Kansas Pacific
programme.desc: With talks of a Civil War brewing, Southern saboteurs know they must keep Northern forces from using the U.S. train system. They devise a daring and dangerous plan to stop and capture a railroad engine, preventing the completion of a railroad line.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas wants to kill an old enemy, Reef Jackson, who is coming to North Fork. In the past, Jackson shot Lucas in the back and tried to steal his wife. Micah puts Lucas in jail to stop him from getting his revenge. Meanwhile, Mark wants to bag an elk.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas wants to kill an old enemy, Reef Jackson, who is coming to North Fork. In the past, Jackson shot Lucas in the back and tried to steal his wife. Micah puts Lucas in jail to stop him from getting his revenge. Meanwhile, Mark wants to bag an elk.

programme.title: Angel and the Badman
programme.desc: When a gunslinger with a bad disposition is nursed back to health and desired by a Quaker girl, he finds himself having to choose between his lawless life or the peaceful world of his newfound love.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: A singing Mountie comes to Fort Courage looking for Agarn's look-alike Canadian cousin, Lucky Pierre Agarniere, a fur trapper accused of stealing furs. Agarn tries to clear his cousin's name and uncover the truth.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: When Major Bradley visits Fort Courage the F Troop learns that they all will be transferred, except for Corporal Agarn, who must stay and train the G Troop. Agarn quickly finds out the new troops are more incompetent than his comrades in F Troop.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: Teaspoon arranges for the hanging of gunslinger, Emory Pike, guilty of murder and bank robbery. However, things get complicated when Pike's brother, Frank, takes Amanda O'Connel, who is like a daughter to Teaspoon, hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas finds a wounded man, takes him to the North Fork doctor, and gives blood to help save the stranger's life. Marshal Torrance won't help as he says he knows the man and wants him dead. Things become more complicated when vigilantes ride to town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Coming home from school, Mark stumbles upon a dead man's body. Lucas discovers he was stabbed and the only clue is a belt with the initials R.M. Lucas leaves Mark with Artemus Quarles, a cousin who is visiting. Quarles, however, is not who he seems.

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: When a card shark receives a letter from a distant and troubled son, he travels to rescue the boy and his mother. During a train ride, the gambler meets a friendly, prideful young card player and shares his wisdom.

programme.title: The Big Trees
programme.desc: A timber baron plans to take advantage of a new law and make millions. Making his money turns out to be harder than he ever thought when the Quakers who own the land refuse to sell their precious trees.

programme.title: High Lonesome
programme.desc: A sudden and swift series of murders occurs in southwestern Texas, sending Big Bend country into a frenzy. All parties are suspicious of a young rambler who just moved to the area, believing his presence must be related to the crimes.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Smitty travel to Mexico to bring a gang of outlaws accused of killing Cheyenne's close friend to justice. However, after they arrive, they discover that the small Mexican town is under the rule of the gang's leader.

programme.title: Angel and the Badman
programme.desc: When a gunslinger with a bad disposition is nursed back to health and desired by a Quaker girl, he finds himself having to choose between his lawless life or the peaceful world of his newfound love.

programme.desc: Coming home from school, Mark stumbles upon a dead man's body. Lucas discovers he was stabbed and the only clue is a belt with the initials R.M. Lucas leaves Mark with Artemus Quarles, a cousin who is visiting. Quarles, however, is not who he seems.

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: When a card shark receives a letter from a distant and troubled son, he travels to rescue the boy and his mother. During a train ride, the gambler meets a friendly, prideful young card player and shares his wisdom.

programme.title: The Big Trees
programme.desc: A timber baron plans to take advantage of a new law and make millions. Making his money turns out to be harder than he ever thought when the Quakers who own the land refuse to sell their precious trees.

programme.title: High Lonesome
programme.desc: A sudden and swift series of murders occurs in southwestern Texas, sending Big Bend country into a frenzy. All parties are suspicious of a young rambler who just moved to the area, believing his presence must be related to the crimes.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Wes Carney, a famous gunfighter, and his new wife Clair move to North Fork. They open a store and settle down. However, three outlaws come to town to challenge him. Carney refuses and they ransack his store, forcing him to put his gunbelt back on.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The guys saddle up to rope in a renegade heifer before she tears up a neighbor's field. Booger creates a birthday to remember for his 85-year-old grandma, including her first ride in a convertible, a photo shoot and a huge surprise party with a special guest. Cody goes on a personal publicity tour to promote the opening of their pop-up restaurant. On the eve of their big opening, the neglected details could turn the cowboys' restaurant dream into a nightmare. Bubba forgets a key ingredient, Cody's efforts bring in an unexpected number of hungry customers, and they run out of their signature steak. It's a night to make the guys wonder if they'd be better off just sticking to The Cowboy Way of life they love.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: It's a rope-swinging episode of The Cowboy Way! After their restaurant venture, each of the cowboys takes some quality time to reconnect with family and discuss their futures. Cody decides to make the ranch high-tech, but will it be a success or will he get his wires crossed? Bubba plays locksmith for Booger's truck. A missing cow gets stuck in the woods. The guys use Booger's annual horse clinic as a way to give back to the community. And get ready for matchmaking the cowboy way! When the boys set up a mixer for bachelors Frankie and Hodge, speed-dating turns into a literal horse race to win the ladies' affections.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens in North Fork, and banker John Hamilton hires Floyd Doniger for security. However, problems arise when robbers who followed the new safe into town discover their old pal Floyd is the bank guard.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Rebecca Snipe returns to North Fork after an extended visit. Lucas' son Mark is smitten and plans to play matchmaker for his dad. However, the Snipe brothers get involved to make sure Lucas is good enough for Rebecca.

programme.title: They Call Me Trinity
programme.desc: When a land-hungry rancher sends his bullies to harass peace-loving Mormons into giving up their fertile valley, a lazy gunfighter with a very quick draw and amazing accuracy, along with his horse-thieving brother, come to the settlers' rescue.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: It's the late 1800s and a marshal must stop a volatile and growing conflict between homesteaders and cattle drivers in his small town on the Kansas frontier.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne finds a dead man's body and strange signs from the mysterious killer on a trail to Crowheart. When he arrives in town with the body, the townspeople suspect him to be a member of the rustler gang that's responsible.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne follows a thief and killer into a small town where the killer's father is the sheriff. After the sheriff resigns, Cheyenne takes the job. Problems arise when he falls for a girl who is the sister of the killer and daughter of the sheriff.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: On his way to Nevada, Adam rides up on some Indians wanting to harm a white woman they believe is a mountain spirit. They escape but Adam is wounded. The woman nurses him back to health but the tribe is on their trail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogerty lives in a rundown house with his grandson, Woody. Lucas tries to get the old man to send the boy to school. The ladies of North Fork want Woody removed from the home and ask Lucas to help them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Famous writer Mark Twain visits North Fork and Mark, who idolizes him, is hurt by his rudeness. Lucas intervenes and discovers the source of Twain's bitterness comes from personal tragedy. Later, both Marks become friends.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A killer, John Holliver, and his followers come to North Fork looking for revenge. All of the residents are terrified since they ran him out of town five years earlier. Lucas, now acting marshal, realizes that he must face Holliver and his men alone.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two mountain men, Ambrose and Gorwin, come to the McCain Ranch. Ambrose is captivated by Lucas' rifle but Lucas won't trade it. After Gorwin is killed trying to steal it, the family holds Lucas accountable.

programme.desc: The guys saddle up to rope in a renegade heifer before she tears up a neighbor's field.
