programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Brac – Hvar
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking you to a surfer's paradise – the island of Brač! We are on a journey to find out why Brač is called by many the island of a million olives, and we are going to explore the beautiful Pakleni islands that are close to this location. Get to know the fantastic wines of the island of Hvar and treat ourselves to some drunk lobster.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Split – Trogir
programme.desc: It is time to explore the wonders of Split, city of the monumental Diocletian's Palace. In this occasion, we will introduce you to the region's beautiful marinas, show you the fastest way of traveling within Croatia and explore the spots you should not miss out.

programme.title: Magnifique Martinique
programme.desc: Martinique is truly magnificent!The Caribbean Island is a paradise for both locals and visitors that year after year come to discover the mysteries of this island. Come discover the beauty of life in the Caribbean in this show.Nautical Channel’s host, Andrew Miller, will show you exciting new places and delicious local cuisine prepared by a great chef. Famous Caribbean Rum for breakfast and an intense session of fly boarding will guarantee madness fun in this exhilarating adventure in Magnifique Martinique.Follow Andrew on a unique discovery in this French holiday destination, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surf The Alps - Winter Kiting In St Moritz
programme.desc: The ice cold winter of Switzerland, wind, a board and a kite! Welcome to the adventure of winter kiting! Join us as we visit the oldest snowkiting school in the world and admire the action the snowkiting legends put up. All of this on the immense frozen Silvaplana Lake in the middle of the highest peaks of the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Surf The Alps - Zurich Wakeboard
programme.desc: Despite being nestled in the heart of the Swiss Alps, Lake Zurich is home to a wealth of water sports. Journalist Lucia Metzbauer wakeboards with Swiss pros, attends the annual match race, and even tries stand-up paddleboarding before discovering a little-known sport: kanupolo.Also, the International Wakeboard Competition of Züri Fäscht 2013 is taking place in the centre of Zurich, and athletes are ready for Switzerland's greatest freestyle competition in this class. Let's dive into it!

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: This time we are going to focus on another exciting Olympic class, the RS:X. The RS:X was first introduced at the 2008 Olympic Games in China. Being the most affordable yachting class eligible for competition in the Olympics, it has been taken up by a large number of sailors from more than 60 nations over 6 continents competing at numerous regattas worldwide.Stay tuned for the next episode as we follow the sailing action around the world! The final countdown for the Olympics in Tokyo has only just begun!

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: Boasting world class competition and legendary parties, the St. Maarten Heineken Regatta reigns as the undisputed king of Caribbean sailing. Given the lineup of over 200 internationally acclaimed boats skippered by the sailing world's top athletes, the stakes are high and anything can happen.Sail with us across the highlights of the 34th edition of the Heineken Regatta!

programme.title: Beneath the Surface
programme.desc: Big wave surfer Andrew Cotton, a plumber and father of two from Devon, hit the headlines in 2014 when it was rumoured that he had surfed the world’s biggest wave, estimated at 80ft. In this one-off 30-minute documentary, Andrew and his team of surfers, sailors and adventurers put everything on hold as they secretly chase a wave that emerges only a handful of times each year, giving only hours of warning.Taking a boat eight miles off the coast of Ireland, the team battle the extreme cold and fierce weather conditions, whilst mapping the ocean’s swell, in order to try to catch one almighty ride. Far from home and with the days getting shorter, frustration sets in, as the window of opportunity gets smaller. With a young family at home, Andrew must balance the normality of the school run, before boarding a plane alone to face one of earth’s deadliest monsters.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode of Road to Bermuda we meet the man who decided to take the America's Cup to Bermuda and explore some of sailing's most complex challenges. Also, the famous skipper Jimmy Spithill will share his experience on the island with us. Watch this and more on The Road to Bermuda!

programme.title: The Cyclades With Andi Van Zyl - Ios
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl is in Ios Island at the time the Meltemi winds start, and she is ready to enjoy watersports both above and below the surface. Andi will understand the significance this island has on its habitants when she discovers what is believed to be the tomb of Homer: the creator of the Iliad and the Odyssey. This is our final stop in this journey around the Cyclades, so Andi is ready to make the most of it.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: We are in Lake Iseo, and it is said on these waters the first motor boat was operated. Now, we will be trying the Ecoline Marine 800 Hybrid that works on diesel propulsion and an electric motor. Then, we will try the Della Pasqua DC Seven, produced by the Italian yard Della Pasqua. Come sail with us!

programme.title: Up the Creek
programme.desc: There's only one boat race in the world where two-man teams blast up southern Australia's Murray River in aluminium dinghies at speeds of over 80kph. This river is not only known for dividing Victoria from New South Wales and for being Australia’s longest river, but also for being full of dangerous obstacles.Up the Creek challenges competing teams to speed up Murray River’s challenging water in a competition like no other. Find out now what will happen in this competition that explores Australia’s nature in depth, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: A Date with the Strait
programme.desc: The Bass Strait is a strip of water that divides the Australian mainland from Tasmania. Knowing that wild storms make the strait twice as rough as the English Channel, sailors stand in awe of the strong currents.In a death-defying act, two Aussies and a young Californian kneeling on their boards brave the 300 km/186.5mi paddle across the Bass Strait. Their adventure lasts several days with stops on small islands along the way. Apart from sharks, currents and threatening waves, win-or-bust Zeb Walsh, Brad Gaul and Jack Bark face sickness, sore muscles and dehydration. Follow their journey on Nautical Channel.

All of this on the immense frozen Silvaplana Lake in the middle of the highest peaks of the Swiss Alps.

programme.desc: Despite being nestled in the heart of the Swiss Alps, Lake Zurich is home to a wealth of water sports. Journalist Lucia Metzbauer wakeboards with Swiss pros, attends the annual match race, and even tries stand-up paddleboarding before discovering a little-known sport: kanupolo.Also, the International Wakeboard Competition of Züri Fäscht 2013 is taking place in the centre of Zurich, and athletes are ready for Switzerland's greatest freestyle competition in this class. programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: This time we are going to focus on another exciting Olympic class, the RS:X. The RS:X was first introduced at the 2008 Olympic Games in China. Being the most affordable yachting class eligible for competition in the Olympics, it has been taken up by a large number of sailors from more than 60 nations over 6 continents competing at numerous regattas worldwide.Stay tuned for the next episode as we follow the sailing action around the world! The final countdown for the Olympics in Tokyo has only just begun!

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: Boasting world class competition and legendary parties, the St. Maarten Heineken Regatta reigns as the undisputed king of Caribbean sailing. Given the lineup of over 200 internationally acclaimed boats skippered by the sailing world's top athletes, the stakes are high and anything can happen.Sail with us across the highlights of the 34th edition of the Heineken Regatta!

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 1
programme.desc: Kite Masters - Episode 1

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 2
programme.desc: Kite Masters - Episode 2

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Brac – Hvar
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking you to a surfer's paradise – the island of Brač! We are on a journey to find out why Brač is called by many the island of a million olives, and we are going to explore the beautiful Pakleni islands that are close to this location. Get to know the fantastic wines of the island of Hvar and treat ourselves to some drunk lobster.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Split – Trogir
programme.desc: It is time to explore the wonders of Split, city of the monumental Diocletian's Palace. In this occasion, we will introduce you to the region's beautiful marinas, show you the fastest way of traveling within Croatia and explore the spots you should not miss out.

programme.title: Beneath the Surface
programme.desc: Big wave surfer Andrew Cotton, a plumber and father of two from Devon, hit the headlines in 2014 when it was rumoured that he had surfed the world’s biggest wave, estimated at 80ft. In this one-off 30-minute documentary, Andrew and his team of surfers, sailors and adventurers put everything on hold as they secretly chase a wave that emerges only a handful of times each year, giving only hours of warning.Taking a boat eight miles off the coast of Ireland, the team battle the extreme cold and fierce weather conditions, whilst mapping the ocean’s swell, in order to try to catch one almighty ride. Far from home and with the days getting shorter, frustration sets in, as the window of opportunity gets smaller. With a young family at home, Andrew must balance the normality of the school run, before boarding a plane alone to face one of earth’s deadliest monsters.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode of Road to Bermuda we meet the man who decided to take the America's Cup to Bermuda and explore some of sailing's most complex challenges. Also, the famous skipper Jimmy Spithill will share his experience on the island with us. Watch this and more on The Road to Bermuda!

programme.title: Torrevieja Euromarina Optimist International Trophy - XV Trofeo Euromarina Optimist Torrevieja
programme.desc: Torrevieja Euromarina Optimist International Trophy - XV Trofeo Euromarina Optimist Torrevieja

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Tour - Episode 2
programme.desc: GWA Wingfoil World Tour - Episode 2

programme.title: The Cyclades With Andi Van Zyl - Ios
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl is in Ios Island at the time the Meltemi winds start, and she is ready to enjoy watersports both above and below the surface. Andi will understand the significance this island has on its habitants when she discovers what is believed to be the tomb of Homer: the creator of the Iliad and the Odyssey. This is our final stop in this journey around the Cyclades, so Andi is ready to make the most of it.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: We are in Lake Iseo, and it is said on these waters the first motor boat was operated. Now, we will be trying the Ecoline Marine 800 Hybrid that works on diesel propulsion and an electric motor. Then, we will try the Della Pasqua DC Seven, produced by the Italian yard Della Pasqua. Come sail with us!

programme.title: Jet RAID - Greece - AMFILOCHIA
programme.desc: Jet RAID - Greece - AMFILOCHIA

programme.title: Up the Creek
programme.desc: There's only one boat race in the world where two-man teams blast up southern Australia's Murray River in aluminium dinghies at speeds of over 80kph. This river is not only known for dividing Victoria from New South Wales and for being Australia’s longest river, but also for being full of dangerous obstacles.Up the Creek challenges competing teams to speed up Murray River’s challenging water in a competition like no other. Find out now what will happen in this competition that explores Australia’s nature in depth, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4
programme.desc: Welcome to the fourth episode of Sailing to Tokyo 2020, in this month’s episode we will focus on two classes that we will be introduced to the Olympics for Paris 2024. iQFOiL and KiteSurfing are set to make their Summer Olympic debut in Marseille after being approved as two out of the ten sailing events on the programme.Vanora ENGADINWIND by Dakine, is one of the most famous water sport events in the world and at this windsurfing festival various events take place, including some freestyle action. Held annually during August on Lake Silvaplana, it attracts some of the best athletes the water sport world has to showcase. Let's dive into the action!

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in Simpson Bay where the St. Maarten Heineken Regatta will celebrate its 35th anniversary edition! With the official slogan being Serious Fun, it is no wonder people come from over 25 countries to attend this one of a kind regatta. Given this year's lineup, we are expecting some of the best sailing in St. Maarten. Watch the highlights of the 2015 edition!

programme.title: The Cyclades With Andi Van Zyl - Naxos Part 1
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl has just arrived to the island of Naxos for the start of summer and the windy season. Naxos is a gem in the Aegean sea, where laughter, activity , sprwaling nature and beautiful beaches await. She is determined to explore the diversity of the island, from ancient greek ruins to modern watersports. Will she be able to handle the strong winds or will rough seas get the better of her?

programme.title: The Cyclades With Andi Van Zyl - Naxos Part 2
programme.desc: Over the past few days Andi has been travelling around Naxos, the largest of the Cyclades Islands in Greece. The Mediterranean waters look so inviting and so Andi cannot resist the opportunity to try a diving lesson on the island. We start our adventure at Blue Fin divers to get on the water. Dive into the second episode of The Cyclades with Andi Van Zyl, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Wind Masters - Episode 8: Rab, Mali Lošinj, Cres

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Jamaica
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this seasonal special, we’ll be catching up with SoftBank Team Japan and Oracle Team USA to find out exactly what they have on their Christmas wish lists this year. Rachel will also be cooking up a local holiday speciality and sampling it to the AC teams, as well as getting her dancing shoes on with the local Gombeys!

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 7
programme.desc: In the last episode of Jump on Board, Linda, Caitlin and Cindy make the most out of their final days at sea with no more challenges and no more punishments. Linda shares her Japanese culture with the crew in an unforgettable night of sushi and sailing geishas. As the trip comes to a close, the girls get closer and even Linda and Blondie seem to be bonding. Will the finale lead to a tragedy or a celebration? Jump on board with us to find out!

programme.title: Discovering Halki
programme.desc: In the south-eastern corner of the Aegean, west of Rhodes, there is a cosy island, a truly untouched gem of the Dodecanese. It’s a realm of rock and absolute peace; an island with great nautical tradition and proud islanders with an innate warmth.If you are looking for a hidden paradise on earth, then you have found the right place. Greece is home to a small island called Halki. Majestic and mystical; ethereal; elegant yet unpolished; and truly authentic.In this episode, we will visit Halki’s capital, Emborio and we will explore, with captain George, all the natural hidden treasures of the island.We are set to discover deep caves, bask on Trahia and Kania beach, and explore Alimia islet. We will visit an abandoned village, learning more about its rich history, and scuba dive down to the sea floor to get closer to a legendary shipwreck.Still untouched by mass tourism, Halki is the perfect destination for relaxing holidays away from the bright lights or for a quick getaway from the island of Rhodes. Watch Discovering Halki to become part of this almost untouched territory that is worth visiting.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Brac – Hvar
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking you to a surfer's paradise – the island of Brač! We are on a journey to find out why Brač is called by many the island of a million olives, and we are going to explore the beautiful Pakleni islands that are close to this location. Get to know the fantastic wines of the island of Hvar and treat ourselves to some drunk lobster.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Split – Trogir
programme.desc: It is time to explore the wonders of Split, city of the monumental Diocletian's Palace. In this occasion, we will introduce you to the region's beautiful marinas, show you the fastest way of traveling within Croatia and explore the spots you should not miss out.

All of this on the immense frozen Silvaplana Lake in the middle of the highest peaks of the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Surf The Alps - Zurich Wakeboard
programme.desc: Despite being nestled in the heart of the Swiss Alps, Lake Zurich is home to a wealth of water sports. Journalist Lucia Metzbauer wakeboards with Swiss pros, attends the annual match race, and even tries stand-up paddleboarding before discovering a little-known sport: kanupolo.Also, the International Wakeboard Competition of Züri Fäscht 2013 is taking place in the centre of Zurich, and athletes are ready for Switzerland's greatest freestyle competition in this class. Let's dive into it!

programme.title: Jet RAID - Greece - AMFILOCHIA
programme.desc: Jet RAID - Greece - AMFILOCHIA

programme.title: Up the Creek
programme.desc: There's only one boat race in the world where two-man teams blast up southern Australia's Murray River in aluminium dinghies at speeds of over 80kph. This river is not only known for dividing Victoria from New South Wales and for being Australia’s longest river, but also for being full of dangerous obstacles.Up the Creek challenges competing teams to speed up Murray River’s challenging water in a competition like no other. Find out now what will happen in this competition that explores Australia’s nature in depth, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4
programme.desc: Welcome to the fourth episode of Sailing to Tokyo 2020, in this month’s episode we will focus on two classes that we will be introduced to the Olympics for Paris 2024. iQFOiL and KiteSurfing are set to make their Summer Olympic debut in Marseille after being approved as two out of the ten sailing events on the programme.Vanora ENGADINWIND by Dakine, is one of the most famous water sport events in the world and at this windsurfing festival various events take place, including some freestyle action. Held annually during August on Lake Silvaplana, it attracts some of the best athletes the water sport world has to showcase. Let's dive into the action!

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in Simpson Bay where the St. Maarten Heineken Regatta will celebrate its 35th anniversary edition! With the official slogan being Serious Fun, it is no wonder people come from over 25 countries to attend this one of a kind regatta. Given this year's lineup, we are expecting some of the best sailing in St. Maarten. Watch the highlights of the 2015 edition!

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 1
programme.desc: Inside Sailing - Episode 1

programme.title: Ciuri Ciuri
programme.desc: Sicily, the largest Mediterranean island and just off the “toe” of Italy’s “boot” is the destination chosen this time by our Nautical Hosts Andi and Chelsey as they head to the South of Italy to meet up with renowned Sicilian sailors.Its rich history is not only reflected in their cuisine and culture, but also on their sailing techniques that balance tradition with modern skills. They will discover the coastlines near Palermo to learn how to tack and jibe and of course will try the delicious Sicilian cuisine.Join Andi and Chelsey on their journey around Sicily learning about sailing and tasting traditional dishes in Ciuri Ciuri, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4 - Rogoznica – Primosten
programme.desc: Today we are taking you to the hidden gems of the Croatian coast. Places of mesmerising beauty but known by few. We are talking about Rogoznica and Primošten! We'll explore the Kornati islands, the destination that amazed the famous writer George Bernard Shaw and much more.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5 - Sibenik – Vodice
programme.desc: We will visit the beautiful historical city of Šibenik, explore fascinating Šibenik channel and the Krka river, learn a bit about unique coral handmade jewelry, visit a very interesting museum on the island of Prvić and much more!

programme.title: The South To Sian Journals
programme.desc: While filming South To Sian, a pair of adventurers dived into what began as a three-month trip and turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration.On boards, bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, Harrison Roach and Zye Norris discovered if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.South to Sian Journals is a collection of stories documenting the people, places & adventures that occurred during the 2 years making “South To Sian” - the challenges, the surfers, riders, shapers, bike builders, filmmakers and photographers.Extremely entertaining and insightful, “Journals” documents the travels, the hardships, the spectacular locations, the personalities and the thoughts of the characters, both in front of and behind the lens.

With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode, we dive into the beauty of Wales: the first and only country to have a hiking trail around it's entire coastline. The Snowdonia National Park is a surfers and stand up paddlers paradise for the few who know about it. Stunning seascapes, ancient castles and perfect surf waves. This week on Facing Waves we're Paddling Wales with Dan and Heleen from Big Blue Adventures.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 2
programme.desc: With 1000 miles of coastline and 250 miles of world class beaches, to many people the Dominican Republic is known as a tropical paradise. Pounding surf, ideal beaches and warm raging water. This week on Facing Waves, we're paddling the Dominican Republic. Luke Hopkins takes his stand up paddleboard on an exploratory journey along the coast, through the rivers, and in the surf that surrounds this idyllic scenery. Come join us!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint World Cup Part 1

programme.title: Stockholm Archipelago Raid
programme.desc: The Stockholm Archipelago Raid is for participants a unique orienteering race in Europe as it offers a mix of sport, nature and adventure to athletes. This archipelago is the largest in Europe, with 36,000 rocks, skerries and islands, as well as one of the most difficult for navigation. There are still islands and groups of islands where no sail race has ever passed due to their remote location or because they are bird or seal protection areas.Experienced sailors from all over the world gather in the heart of Sweden as it hosts the first F18 Raid World ever. Winners will be crowned as the best long distance F18 raid sailors in the world, marking history in this nautical sport.Watch the Stockholm Archipelago Raid on Nautical Channel and discover the limitless possibilities of this Raid for brave competitors that will race in these remote islands.

programme.title: PaddleSUP Mission Amazon
programme.desc: Charlie Head will attempt the first ever stand-up paddle boarding of the main water source of the Amazon, the Rio Marañón in Peru. It’s never been attempted before and will be the most arduous and longest SUP journey ever made.Two months of using just his physical and mental strength, Charlie will overcome extreme terrain, trek around impassable river rock falls, survive freezing waters, high altitude, swarms of insects and suspicious local tribes.However, all the hardships will be worth it if he can help shine some light on one of the planet’s most endangered environments and educates us on conservation as over 20 new dams are planned to be constructed on the river's free-flowing stretches. This could have, according to scientists, drastic consequences on the Amazon basin forever.If Charlie does not embark on this adventure now, he may never be able to do so. Find out more with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Jamaica
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4
programme.desc: Welcome to the fourth episode of Sailing to Tokyo 2020, in this month’s episode we will focus on two classes that we will be introduced to the Olympics for Paris 2024. iQFOiL and KiteSurfing are set to make their Summer Olympic debut in Marseille after being approved as two out of the ten sailing events on the programme.Vanora ENGADINWIND by Dakine, is one of the most famous water sport events in the world and at this windsurfing festival various events take place, including some freestyle action. Held annually during August on Lake Silvaplana, it attracts some of the best athletes the water sport world has to showcase. Let's dive into the action!

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in Simpson Bay where the St. Maarten Heineken Regatta will celebrate its 35th anniversary edition! With the official slogan being Serious Fun, it is no wonder people come from over 25 countries to attend this one of a kind regatta. Given this year's lineup, we are expecting some of the best sailing in St. Maarten. Watch the highlights of the 2015 edition!

programme.title: The Cyclades With Andi Van Zyl - Naxos Part 1
programme.desc: Andi van Zyl has just arrived to the island of Naxos for the start of summer and the windy season. Naxos is a gem in the Aegean sea, where laughter, activity , sprwaling nature and beautiful beaches await. She is determined to explore the diversity of the island, from ancient greek ruins to modern watersports. Will she be able to handle the strong winds or will rough seas get the better of her?

programme.title: The Cyclades With Andi Van Zyl - Naxos Part 2
programme.desc: Over the past few days Andi has been travelling around Naxos, the largest of the Cyclades Islands in Greece. The Mediterranean waters look so inviting and so Andi cannot resist the opportunity to try a diving lesson on the island. We start our adventure at Blue Fin divers to get on the water. Dive into the second episode of The Cyclades with Andi Van Zyl, exclusive on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Jet RAID - Greece
programme.desc: We are in the city of Oropos for the first leg of the Jet Raid. In the coming days, we are going to cross over 1200km, visiting the islands of Milos, Kimolos, the city of Oropos and also Eretria, Kalkhida, and Nea Artaki amongst other islands. All the pilots will be rivals for the leaderboard, but we have separated them in different categories: Formula 1, F2 and F3. All of them driven in the world of jet skis and extreme sports.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the eleventh edition of the biennial race of Clipper: The Race of Their Lives. 700 participants representing over 40 nations will take on the challenge of dealing with whatever 'Mother Nature' has in store. They will battle the elements out on the world's greatest oceans and will experiences the toughest conditions imaginable: from hurricane force winds to squalls that can knock a boat flat. Find out now what will happen in this unique challenge.

programme.title: PWA World Cup - Tiberias, Israel
programme.desc: Athletes are meeting in Tiberias, Israel, for the PWA World Cup. This first leg of this year's competition will be filled with action after 18 months of inactivity. With winds between 18 and 30 knots, it will truly be a challenge for the world's best windsurf sailors and with this uncertainty in the conditions, we can expect anything to happen in Israel. Don't miss out on the PWA World Cup 2021 in Tiberias that marks the beginning of this year's windsurfing action!

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: The St. Maarten Heineken Regatta is about to celebrate its 36th edition. This world renowned sailing event offers four days of World Class Racing, with trade winds coming from the North East, an average temperature of 25°C and crystal clear waters. Courses will take participants along coastal races, as well as around the island, presenting the beautiful beaches, rock formations and other scenery. On shore, participants and visitors will be able to enjoy the culture, cuisine and music from both the Dutch and French side. Are you going to miss out? Come dive in at the 2016 Heineken Regatta!

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: For its 38th edition, the Tour de France à la Voile has undergone a revolution. Out with the monohulls and in with the trimarans! Also, no more sailing from one venue to another, instead races will be shorter, more intense and spectacular, so the crowd will be closer to the action. Let's relive the best moments of the Tour de France à la Voile 2015.

programme.title: Brilliant Corners Jamaica
programme.desc: The Caribbean is filled with places where tourism is rare or close to non-existent. However, there is so much potential for cultural and water sports tourism, they are called Brilliant corners. Nautical Channel is on a mission to explore the brilliant corners of the Caribbean.Going from Haiti all the way to Jamaica or Barbados, we will dive into these brilliant corners, many of them with no tourism at all. With a sustainable tourism approach, get ready to live a fully local experience on Brilliant Corners Jamaica while we practice water sports, taste the traditional local dishes and talk with the habitants of the area.On this occasion, we venture into Jamaica: the third-largest island of the Greater Antilles and Caribbean, home to famous personalities like Bob Marley or Usain Bolt. Through extreme surf travel and consequent writing and aestheticized by jazz, Sam Bleakley gives a voice to the brilliant corners of this country, revealing the character of the place by getting inside the mind of a coastline as much as people.Immerse yourself in the beauty of the yet to discover areas of the Caribbean, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Of Men and Mavericks
programme.desc: After getting inspired by Chasing Mavericks, a movie featuring Gerard Butler, Of Men and Mavericks covers the story of surfing legends like Peter Mel, Jeff Clark and Mark Foo in their attempts to surf mavericks. They recount their first ventures in the Half Moon Bay spot and how they managed to conquer waves that reached more than 8 meters of height.Their perseverance, enthusiasm and willingness got them time after time into the cold waters of San Francisco to attempt a dangerous task that could have fatal repercussions. Their goal: to surf some of the biggest waves in the world.Follow the path of these brave surfers who leave it all behind to surf big waves, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 3
programme.desc: It's a new year, so what kind of resolutions have the America's Cup athletes made? And what's the local hangover cure for too much Bermudan rum? Find out in episode 3 of Road to Bermuda! We take look at the the regatta of 2015, before celebrating the start of the New Year with the local cocktail: dark ‘n’ stormies. Finally, we make sure we start the year in a good mood with the happiest man on the island, Johnny Barnes.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 1
programme.desc: Andi is on a mission to discover the Tana River, Kenya’s longest river with a unique rapids system. In order to truly experience this region of the Tana, Andi has to learn to navigate the waters on a kayak. She tracks down river expert and professional Kayaker Kris Collyer and challenges him to learn his skill in three days. Andi is tested when she almost drowns trying to complete her mission.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi will discover the diverse marine ecosystem of Kilifi Creek. She will learn how to sail in three days in order to truly experience the creek. Andi goes 3 degrees south to meet Kevin, a local sailor who patiently teaches Andi the skills she needs in this short span of time. A true local experience is waiting if she can complete her training but failure is always lurking.

programme.title: Breskell
programme.desc: Master wooden boat builder Olivier D. Huin is back with his crew of Arctic explorers, this time with a much bolder challenge. To take on the legendary Northwest Passages in his hand-built wooden boat; Breskell.In order to succeed the crew will have to brave 5,000 miles of Arctic storms, polar bears and a constantly moving maze of thick arctic sea ice. People have been trying to accomplish this task for the past 500 years, however only a handful of wooden boats have ever successfully made the trip throught this arid landscape.Find out whether if Breskell will be successful in their perilous path or will have to ask for assistance as the wooden boat gets stuck forever in the artic ice. Now available on Nautical Channel.Awards:Finalist – Ottawa Adventure Film Festival 2019. Grand Prize – Adventure Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 6 - Biograd – Ugljan
programme.desc: We have arrived at the heart of the Croatian coast, the royal town of Biograd and the island Ugljan known for top quality olive and fish products. We are going to visit the beautiful Crvena Luka resort, the indescribably pretty Telašćica nature park and reveal one little island lost in time.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7 - Zadar – Nin
programme.desc: Today we will be exploring the historical city of Zadar, its numerous attractions and some very special secrets. You will also discover with us the biggest marina in Croatia and the amazing old city of Nin.

programme.title: Posh Port - Madeira
programme.desc: In this episode, host Andi van Zyl gets an inside look at the eco-friendly Quinta do Lorde of Portugal's Madeira island. We will interview the Marina Manager at this dazzling destination and Andi will explore the marina and surrounding coastline. Then, she will learn how to cook a delicious traditional platter and even go sailing taking a dive with dolphins!

programme.title: Posh Port - Montenegro
programme.desc: Posh Ports is a new Nautical Channel original series which takes viewers on exclusive tours of the world’s most extravagant marinas, and yacht clubs! In this episode, host Andrew Miller gets an inside look at the luxurious Porto Montenegro, explores the surrounding coastline, and puts his safety on the line wakeboarding in the marina!

programme.title: Of Men and Mavericks
programme.desc: After getting inspired by Chasing Mavericks, a movie featuring Gerard Butler, Of Men and Mavericks covers the story of surfing legends like Peter Mel, Jeff Clark and Mark Foo in their attempts to surf mavericks. They recount their first ventures in the Half Moon Bay spot and how they managed to conquer waves that reached more than 8 meters of height.Their perseverance, enthusiasm and willingness got them time after time into the cold waters of San Francisco to attempt a dangerous task that could have fatal repercussions. Their goal: to surf some of the biggest waves in the world.Follow the path of these brave surfers who leave it all behind to surf big waves, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Jet RAID - Greece
programme.desc: We are in the city of Oropos for the first leg of the Jet Raid. In the coming days, we are going to cross over 1200km, visiting the islands of Milos, Kimolos, the city of Oropos and also Eretria, Kalkhida, and Nea Artaki amongst other islands. All the pilots will be rivals for the leaderboard, but we have separated them in different categories: Formula 1, F2 and F3. All of them driven in the world of jet skis and extreme sports.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 3
programme.desc: It's a new year, so what kind of resolutions have the America's Cup athletes made? And what's the local hangover cure for too much Bermudan rum? Find out in episode 3 of Road to Bermuda! We take look at the the regatta of 2015, before celebrating the start of the New Year with the local cocktail: dark ‘n’ stormies. Finally, we make sure we start the year in a good mood with the happiest man on the island, Johnny Barnes.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: Hello and welcome to the fifth episode of Sailing to Tokyo 2020! We continue with more sailing action from the current fastest Olympic sailing classes, in Lake Attersee, Austria for the 2020 Forward WIP 49er, 49er FX & Nacra 17 European Championships. After many cancellations due to the Covid pandemic this event was the most important for these Olympic classes in 2020.Get on board with us as we go Sailing to Tokyo!

programme.title: Heineken Regatta - Episode 1
programme.desc: The St. Maarten Heineken Regatta is about to celebrate its 36th edition. This world renowned sailing event offers four days of World Class Racing, with trade winds coming from the North East, an average temperature of 25°C and crystal clear waters. Courses will take participants along coastal races, as well as around the island, presenting the beautiful beaches, rock formations and other scenery. On shore, participants and visitors will be able to enjoy the culture, cuisine and music from both the Dutch and French side. Are you going to miss out? Come dive in at the 2016 Heineken Regatta!

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 3
programme.desc: The fourth largest island nation in the Caribbean, Jamaica is a tropicla paradise known worldwide for beautiful beaches, jerk chicken and for being the place where reggae was created. Even though the surfing scene here is surprisingly small and undeveloped, surfers are passionate as any. This week on Facing Waves we will be paddling Jamaica with Ken Whiting.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 4
programme.desc: 190 miles of paddling route. The Great Calusa Blueway Paddling Trail makes its way through the coastal water and inland tributaries of Lee Country in Florida. It is home to a wide range of marine life and birds, and it offers a unique experience for all types of paddlers. Luke Hopkins and Anne Pagano will explore one of the world’s great water trails by stand up paddle board in this week's episode of Facing Waves.

programme.title: Undercurrents
programme.desc: Undercurrents explores connection and compassion through the eyes of two female surfers as they share their motivation time after time to go back to the water despite cold waves, fears and little reward. Bringing in ideas from the Blue Mind movement and science of mindfulness, get ready to flow with the blue ocean as we explore the relationship with the sea to find out what happens when we pursue what we love.Arlene Maltman is one of first British & European female surfing champions. Natalie Fox is a Yogi, Surf instructor and marine activist. Throughout the film, they share their experiences and relationship with the sea.Neuroscientist & Mindfulness innovator Dr Tamara Russell & Blue Health Coach / Blue Mind Advocate, Lizzi Larbalestier provide expertise on how our minds and bodies are connected to the ocean and how this can have a benefit to our health and wellbeing.Awards:New Talent Award – Adventure Uncovered Film Festival 2020. Best Adventure Film – Shexreme Film Festival 2019.

programme.title: Of Men and Mavericks

programme.title: Jet RAID - Greece
programme.desc: We are in the city of Oropos for the first leg of the Jet Raid. In the coming days, we are going to cross over 1200km, visiting the islands of Milos, Kimolos, the city of Oropos and also Eretria, Kalkhida, and Nea Artaki amongst other islands. All the pilots will be rivals for the leaderboard, but we have separated them in different categories: Formula 1, F2 and F3. All of them driven in the world of jet skis and extreme sports.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 2
programme.desc: The Clipper Race crews are in Uruguay and celebrate a wonderful visit with a spectacular send-off. One crew has suffered a dramatic incident in the middle of the night, and there is a tragedy that will affect everyone involved in the race. Find out now how the challengers will overcome their obstacles in one of the toughest nautical competitions around the globe.

programme.title: UIM XCAT World Championship - Ep.5 - Arabia Saudi GP
programme.desc: UIM XCAT World Championship - Ep.5 - Arabia Saudi GP

programme.title: Journey To Giglio
programme.desc: On January of 2012 the Italian cruise ship Costa Concordia sank in shallow waters after striking an underwater rock off Isola del Giglio. Many things remained unclear about this tragedy, so Andi van Zyl is set to discover the truth regarding this incident.Journey to Giglio is an investigative piece on the infamous Costa Concordia tragedy. Andi van Zyl is on the Italian island of Giglio for an exclusive exposé on the shipwreck that shocked the world. She will leave no rock unturned as she digs into what happened the night of the accident and uncovers the disaster’s impact on the local residents and economy.Highlights include exploration of the island and disaster site, and an interview with the man at the helm of the salvage operation, Nick Sloane. Andi sits down with the fellow South African to discuss the delicate process of freeing the wrecked cruise-liner from the reef without spoiling the pristine waters of Giglio Island.Find out the mystery behind the sinking of Costa Concordia on this Journey to Giglio.

programme.title: Bart's Bash
programme.desc: The Bart’s Bash was created in an attempt to break the world record for the largest sailing race ever. Honouring America’s Cup great athlete Andrew “Bart” Simpson, this 24-hour race is compiled of thousands of sailors from over 60 countries set to take place at multiple ports. This fundraising race connects sailing communities across the globe and is sure to bring exciting competition all for a good cause. Sailing with a smile on their face, competitors rush across different venues raising money for the Andrew Simpson Foundation. The Foundations is driven by their belief that all young people should have the ability to excel and succeed in life and work, promoting health and well-being. Be part of this fundraising competition that yearly brings together thousands of people for a charitable cause.

She will leave no rock unturned as she digs into what happened the night of the accident and uncovers the disaster’s impact on the local residents and economy.Highlights include exploration of the island and disaster site, and an interview with the man at the helm of the salvage operation, Nick Sloane. Andi sits down with the fellow South African to discuss the delicate process of freeing the wrecked cruise-liner from the reef without spoiling the pristine waters of Giglio Island.Find out the mystery behind the sinking of Costa Concordia on this Journey to Giglio.

programme.title: Of Men and Mavericks
programme.desc: After getting inspired by Chasing Mavericks, a movie featuring Gerard Butler, Of Men and Mavericks covers the story of surfing legends like Peter Mel, Jeff Clark and Mark Foo in their attempts to surf mavericks. They recount their first ventures in the Half Moon Bay spot and how they managed to conquer waves that reached more than 8 meters of height.Their perseverance, enthusiasm and willingness got them time after time into the cold waters of San Francisco to attempt a dangerous task that could have fatal repercussions. Their goal: to surf some of the biggest waves in the world.Follow the path of these brave surfers who leave it all behind to surf big waves, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 3
programme.desc: We venture into Kenya’s wild coastline in the Watamu region. This Marine reserve is incredibly unique and in order for Andi to truly experience it she has to learn to kite surf in a very short period of time. She needs help, so she decides to track down the Tribe Watersports and Ben Kelliher who will guide her through a crash course in kitesurfing. If she can do it in the allocated time, Ben has an incredible prize waiting for her.

programme.title: Tour De France à La Voile - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to Dunkirk. Over the years, the northern city and its iconic beaches have become the traditional point of departure for the Tour de France à la Voile. Some skippers already have their sights set on victory, while others are here to discover the Tour and soak up the atmosphere to learn from the best. Let's dive into the action, on the 2016 Tour de France à la Voile!

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 3
programme.desc: It's a new year, so what kind of resolutions have the America's Cup athletes made? And what's the local hangover cure for too much Bermudan rum? Finally, we make sure we start the year in a good mood with the happiest man on the island, Johnny Barnes.

programme.title: PRADA 36th America's Cup - The Last Call Documentary
programme.desc: The competition in the PRADA 36th America’s Cup has come to an end, but we cannot leave without a tribute. In The Last Call Documentary, we go back in time to see the best moments and talk with the characters that define the present and future of the America's Cup. From the preparation for the PRADA Cup to the result in the 36th America's Cup Match find it all out.

programme.title: A Surfing Life: David Van Zyl
programme.desc: David Van Zyl is a young South-African surfer that is quickly gaining popularity and becoming a rising star on the pro-surfer scene. For surf connoisseurs, his name has made history in 2019 as the first International Surfer to ever win the Vans Pro competition in Hawaii. Before then, Hawaiian surfers had an undefeated upper hand that was finally overcome by this young underdog. He now faces new challenges to engrave his name in fame.Get ready to catch some South African waves with David Van Zyl and find out more about his lifestyle on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 4
programme.desc: The February episode is Valentine’s Day themed! We meet the new members of SoftBank Team Japan and find out what it takes to make it onto the team, as well as their thoughts on love. Then, we get an exclusive look at the site of the AC35 Event Village, and take the ultimate challenge – trying out for Bermuda’s Red Bull Youth America’s Cup team.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 4
programme.desc: Andi is back in the Watamu Marine Reserve but this time on a new mission: save the endangered sea turtles. She spends three days at the Local Ocean Trust with Marine Biologist Casper van de Geer. If Andi can learn the importance of sea turtles in the marine ecosystem and the vital skills needed to protect them, she might have the opportunity to release a turtle back into the wild.

programme.title: Journey To Giglio
programme.desc: On January of 2012 the Italian cruise ship Costa Concordia sank in shallow waters after striking an underwater rock off Isola del Giglio. Many things remained unclear about this tragedy, so Andi van Zyl is set to discover the truth regarding this incident.Journey to Giglio is an investigative piece on the infamous Costa Concordia tragedy. Andi van Zyl is on the Italian island of Giglio for an exclusive exposé on the shipwreck that shocked the world. She will leave no rock unturned as she digs into what happened the night of the accident and uncovers the disaster’s impact on the local residents and economy.Highlights include exploration of the island and disaster site, and an interview with the man at the helm of the salvage operation, Nick Sloane. Andi sits down with the fellow South African to discuss the delicate process of freeing the wrecked cruise-liner from the reef without spoiling the pristine waters of Giglio Island.Find out the mystery behind the sinking of Costa Concordia on this Journey to Giglio.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 1 World Cup Szeged
programme.desc: The Sprint World Cup from the International Canoe Federation starts in Szeged, in the south of Hungary. This is the first Sprint World Cup of the 2018 season, and 700 athletes from 62 nations have been battling it out for the top spot. Who will raise to the top as the best nation in the sport? Find out on the highlights of the 2018 Sprint World Cup 1 Szeged.

programme.title: PRADA 36th America's Cup - The Last Call Documentary
programme.desc: The competition in the PRADA 36th America’s Cup has come to an end, but we cannot leave without a tribute. In The Last Call Documentary, we go back in time to see the best moments and talk with the characters that define the present and future of the America's Cup. From the preparation for the PRADA Cup to the result in the 36th America's Cup Match find it all out.

programme.title: A Surfing Life: David Van Zyl
programme.desc: David Van Zyl is a young South-African surfer that is quickly gaining popularity and becoming a rising star on the pro-surfer scene. For surf connoisseurs, his name has made history in 2019 as the first International Surfer to ever win the Vans Pro competition in Hawaii. Before then, Hawaiian surfers had an undefeated upper hand that was finally overcome by this young underdog. He now faces new challenges to engrave his name in fame.Get ready to catch some South African waves with David Van Zyl and find out more about his lifestyle on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Road To Bermuda - Episode 4
programme.desc: The February episode is Valentine’s Day themed! We meet the new members of SoftBank Team Japan and find out what it takes to make it onto the team, as well as their thoughts on love. Then, we get an exclusive look at the site of the AC35 Event Village, and take the ultimate challenge – trying out for Bermuda’s Red Bull Youth America’s Cup team.

programme.title: Longines FEI Nations Cup - 2019 La Baule Competition
programme.desc: La Baule welcomes leaders of the jumping competition at the François André stadium for the first stage of the European Division 1 of the Longines FEI Jumping Nations Cup series. For four days, teams from all nationalities will compete with their teams for the delight of spectators.Watch the full competition of the Longines FEI Nations Cup in La Baule.

programme.title: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 6 - Hardy Haflingers, Swiss Stars & Pint-sized Ponies
programme.desc: This month on Ride from FEI Originals presented by Longines we visit Moscarr Farm in the East Midlands, home to a hardy herd of Haflingers and the oldest UK stud of its kind. We spend time with Swiss Jumping sensation and Longines’ Ambassador Edouard Schmitz and big-up the pint-sized Shetland pony stealing people’s hearts in Germany.

programme.title: FEI Ride Show - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we find out why Danish Show Jumper Tina Lund decided to move to the UAE. Also, we dive deeper into Florida's blossoming equestrian fitness scene. Daniel Bachmann Andersen will give us an update on his latest career move but before then, we will hear from Indian Eventer Fouaad Mirza about his passion for horses and sport.

programme.title: FEI Ride Show - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this week's episode we go to Germany. Here, we will meet the award winning equine photographer Carina Maiwald. Later, the Scottish war veteran, Harry Marshall tells us his story and how horses helped him with PTSD. But before all this, we begin our journey in the heart of London at the Ebony Horse Club to find out more about horse riding and its benefits to children.

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Lignieres
programme.desc: France is the host country for the Event Rider Masters 2019 Finale. The eventing competition concludes in Lingnières en Berry, at the Pöle du Cheval et de l'Àne venue. This area is unique for its romantic cities and villages surrounded by abundant countryside, hills and woodlands. Relive the most exciting moments of the 2019 finale at Lignieres.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - GP Andalucía - March
programme.desc: The CSI4* Andalucía GP takes place in the main arena of the Sunshine Tour, and it is the 3rd qualifier for the Invitational GP. The 1.55m course counts for the Longines ranking, so all riders are ready to give it their all to improve their international rankings. Watch the best moments of the Andalucía GP 2022 edition.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to episode 3 of The Polo Show. This time we travel to the home of polo for a special look at the iconic English season. Set within the land of the rolling green fields with sports running through its heart amongst castles and history there is no better place for the home of polo to be.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: This is episode 4 of The Polo Show. We take a look back at the highlights from some of the most prestigious polo tournaments that dominated the European circuit this summer. We will enjoy of olympic history in Berlin with the German Open, horseriding in the beautiful beach or enjoying the French Riviera at the exclusive Saint-Tropez Polo Club in this episode. Come for a ride with us!

programme.title: Madrid Horse Week - Damm Trophy
programme.desc: The CSI5*W Damm Trophy is one of the toughest and most awaited competition during the Madrid Horse Week. With a maximum height of 1.55m, very few riders make it to the jump-off and competitors need to stay focussed from start to end. Will Portuguese rider Luciana Diniz repeat her 2019 success with Vertigo du Desert? Let's find out in the 2021 edition of the CSI5*-W Estrella Damm Trophy.

programme.desc: We begin this chapter rating and voting the student boxes organization at the stables and learning some tips on how horses should be taken care of in the stables. programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we will share with you some of the highlights of some of the best Women's Tournaments of 2019. We went to Florida to enjoy the US Open Women's Championship, across the Atlantic to England for the Staple International between England and Argentina, over to France where we stopped in Saint-Tropez for the Women's International and in Chantilly for the Women's French Open. Then back over to Argentina to enjoy the Pink Polo at Thai Polo Club.

programme.title: CHIO Aachen - Best Moments
programme.desc: Words speak for themselves. An equestrian show unrivalled anywhere in the world, offering the highest level of performance. The CHIO Aachen is probably the most prestigious horse show in Europe when it comes to show jumping and dressage. Riders compete against each other in this episode for victory in the show jumping competition. Relive all the magic moments of the 2019 edition of the CHIO Aachen.

programme.desc: France is the host country for the Event Rider Masters 2019 Finale. The eventing competition concludes in Lingnières en Berry, at the Pöle du Cheval et de l'Àne venue. This area is unique for its romantic cities and villages surrounded by abundant countryside, hills and woodlands. Relive the most exciting moments of the 2019 finale at Lignieres.

programme.desc: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 16 - Riyadh

programme.desc: Global Champions League - Episode 16 - Riyadh

programme.title: FEI Ride Show - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we find out why Danish Show Jumper Tina Lund decided to move to the UAE. Also, we dive deeper into Florida's blossoming equestrian fitness scene. Daniel Bachmann Andersen will give us an update on his latest career move but before then, we will hear from Indian Eventer Fouaad Mirza about his passion for horses and sport.

programme.title: FEI Ride Show - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this week's episode we go to Germany. Here, we will meet the award winning equine photographer Carina Maiwald. Later, the Scottish war veteran, Harry Marshall tells us his story and how horses helped him with PTSD. But before all this, we begin our journey in the heart of London at the Ebony Horse Club to find out more about horse riding and its benefits to children.

programme.title: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 6 - Hardy Haflingers, Swiss Stars & Pint-sized Ponies
programme.desc: This month on Ride from FEI Originals presented by Longines we visit Moscarr Farm in the East Midlands, home to a hardy herd of Haflingers and the oldest UK stud of its kind. We spend time with Swiss Jumping sensation and Longines’ Ambassador Edouard Schmitz and big-up the pint-sized Shetland pony stealing people’s hearts in Germany.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Deauville International Polo Club vs Empire Club of Coachella Valley
programme.desc: Deauville International Polo Club is going against Empire Club of Coachella Valley in this first stage of the 2021 Polo Rider Cup at the Polo Club of Chantilly. Both teams have been preparing hard for this moment and are ready to make the most points to advance to the next stage. Who will win?

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we will share with you some of the highlights of some of the best Women's Tournaments of 2019. We went to Florida to enjoy the US Open Women's Championship, across the Atlantic to England for the Staple International between England and Argentina, over to France where we stopped in Saint-Tropez for the Women's International and in Chantilly for the Women's French Open. Then back over to Argentina to enjoy the Pink Polo at Thai Polo Club.

programme.title: CHIO Aachen - Best Moments
programme.desc: Words speak for themselves. An equestrian show unrivalled anywhere in the world, offering the highest level of performance. The CHIO Aachen is probably the most prestigious horse show in Europe when it comes to show jumping and dressage. Riders compete against each other in this episode for victory in the show jumping competition. Relive all the magic moments of the 2019 edition of the CHIO Aachen.

programme.title: Brussels Stephex Masters - Highlights
programme.desc: Competing at the Brussels Stephex Masters means competing at one of the world’s most prestigious international show jumping competitions. With a CSI5* rating, get ready to jump into a world of extravaganza and magic that remind us why the Brussels Stephex Masters is not just an event, but a whole experience.Discover the highlights of the competition.

programme.title: CSI2* Santander - Highlights
programme.desc: The traditional International Showjumping of Santander is about to happen in the Palacio de la Magdalena. The finest riders on both the national and international scene will make an appearance at the Campa de la Magdalena to enjoy one of the most demanding events in Spain.Join their fight to determine the best rider on their category with a 1.40m class jump off, on Horse TV.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 2
programme.desc: Get ready for a ride with us in this new episode of Horse Academy Pro! This time, Rolf Göran-Bengtsson will be teaching us how to make proper turns and students will be practicing jumps in a closed circuit with their horses. They will be increasing the height as students get better, will they be capable to adapt quickly to Bengtsson's teachings? Find it out on this exclusive show on HorseTV.

programme.title: FEI Ride Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: The Mexican Show Jumper Eugenio Garza Perez takes us on a stable tour at El Milagro. Then, paralympic Dressage Gold Medallist Natasha Baker takes to the slopes, and we find out how the Swedish Eventing Team have been working through the coronavirus pandemic. Lastly, we hear from British Eventer Laura Collett after her first five star win at Pau.

programme.title: FEI Ride Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this last episode of the season, we hear from Dressage Rider, Sonnar Murray-Brown about his rise in the sport to the top level. Then, we go to Australia to find out about the Equine Pathways program. Show Jumper William Funnell will tell us about The Billy Stud and we will see the incredible work done behind the World Horse Wellfare.

programme.title: Dubai Polo Gold Cup - Final
programme.desc: The world's best polo teams meet at the Dubai Polo Gold Cup competition. After days of competition, UAE and AM are the two lasting teams who will dispute the most important Polo tournament in Asia and the Middle East. They will have to show a combination of equestrian pursuits, skills and team effort to win. Relive the 2020 final between UAE vs. AM.

With a CSI5* rating, get ready to jump into a world of extravaganza and magic that remind us why the Brussels Stephex Masters is not just an event, but a whole experience.Discover the highlights of the competition.

programme.title: CSI2* Santander - Highlights
programme.desc: The traditional International Showjumping of Santander is about to happen in the Palacio de la Magdalena. The finest riders on both the national and international scene will make an appearance at the Campa de la Magdalena to enjoy one of the most demanding events in Spain.Join their fight to determine the best rider on their category with a 1.40m class jump off, on Horse TV.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 2
programme.desc: Get ready for a ride with us in this new episode of Horse Academy Pro! This time, Rolf Göran-Bengtsson will be teaching us how to make proper turns and students will be practicing jumps in a closed circuit with their horses. They will be increasing the height as students get better, will they be capable to adapt quickly to Bengtsson's teachings? Find it out on this exclusive show on HorseTV.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Deauville International Polo Club vs Empire Club of Coachella Valley
programme.desc: Deauville International Polo Club is going against Empire Club of Coachella Valley in this first stage of the 2021 Polo Rider Cup at the Polo Club of Chantilly. Both teams have been preparing hard for this moment and are ready to make the most points to advance to the next stage. Who will win?

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we will share with you some of the highlights of some of the best Women's Tournaments of 2019. We went to Florida to enjoy the US Open Women's Championship, across the Atlantic to England for the Staple International between England and Argentina, over to France where we stopped in Saint-Tropez for the Women's International and in Chantilly for the Women's French Open. Then back over to Argentina to enjoy the Pink Polo at Thai Polo Club.

programme.title: CHIO Aachen - Best Moments
programme.desc: Words speak for themselves. An equestrian show unrivalled anywhere in the world, offering the highest level of performance. The CHIO Aachen is probably the most prestigious horse show in Europe when it comes to show jumping and dressage. Riders compete against each other in this episode for victory in the show jumping competition. Relive all the magic moments of the 2019 edition of the CHIO Aachen.

programme.title: FEI Ride Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: The Mexican Show Jumper Eugenio Garza Perez takes us on a stable tour at El Milagro. Then, paralympic Dressage Gold Medallist Natasha Baker takes to the slopes, and we find out how the Swedish Eventing Team have been working through the coronavirus pandemic. Lastly, we hear from British Eventer Laura Collett after her first five star win at Pau.

programme.title: FEI Ride Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this last episode of the season, we hear from Dressage Rider, Sonnar Murray-Brown about his rise in the sport to the top level. Then, we go to Australia to find out about the Equine Pathways program. Show Jumper William Funnell will tell us about The Billy Stud and we will see the incredible work done behind the World Horse Wellfare.

programme.title: Dubai Polo Gold Cup - Final
programme.desc: The world's best polo teams meet at the Dubai Polo Gold Cup competition. After days of competition, UAE and AM are the two lasting teams who will dispute the most important Polo tournament in Asia and the Middle East. They will have to show a combination of equestrian pursuits, skills and team effort to win. Relive the 2020 final between UAE vs. AM.

programme.title: Brussels Stephex Masters - Highlights
programme.desc: Competing at the Brussels Stephex Masters means competing at one of the world’s most prestigious international show jumping competitions. With a CSI5* rating, get ready to jump into a world of extravaganza and magic that remind us why the Brussels Stephex Masters is not just an event, but a whole experience.Discover the highlights of the competition.

programme.title: CSI2* Santander - Highlights
programme.desc: The traditional International Showjumping of Santander is about to happen in the Palacio de la Magdalena. The finest riders on both the national and international scene will make an appearance at the Campa de la Magdalena to enjoy one of the most demanding events in Spain.Join their fight to determine the best rider on their category with a 1.40m class jump off, on Horse TV.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 2
programme.desc: Get ready for a ride with us in this new episode of Horse Academy Pro! This time, Rolf Göran-Bengtsson will be teaching us how to make proper turns and students will be practicing jumps in a closed circuit with their horses. programme.title: FEI Ride Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: The Mexican Show Jumper Eugenio Garza Perez takes us on a stable tour at El Milagro. Then, paralympic Dressage Gold Medallist Natasha Baker takes to the slopes, and we find out how the Swedish Eventing Team have been working through the coronavirus pandemic. Lastly, we hear from British Eventer Laura Collett after her first five star win at Pau.

programme.title: FEI Ride Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this last episode of the season, we hear from Dressage Rider, Sonnar Murray-Brown about his rise in the sport to the top level. Then, we go to Australia to find out about the Equine Pathways program. Show Jumper William Funnell will tell us about The Billy Stud and we will see the incredible work done behind the World Horse Wellfare.

programme.title: Dubai Polo Gold Cup - Final
programme.desc: The world's best polo teams meet at the Dubai Polo Gold Cup competition. After days of competition, UAE and AM are the two lasting teams who will dispute the most important Polo tournament in Asia and the Middle East. They will have to show a combination of equestrian pursuits, skills and team effort to win. Relive the 2020 final between UAE vs. AM.

programme.title: Jumping International de Dinard - Grand Prix
programme.desc: The acclaimed CSI5* Grand Prix de la Ville de Dinard is, together with the Derby, one of the top events of the Jumping International de Dinard. Top equestrians from all around the world gather to try their best against the clock in this physically-straining course. Discover the outcome of the Grand Prix 2019.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 1 - Isabell Werth
programme.desc: One of the most successful dressage riders in history, Isabell Werth has already won 10 Olympic medals. She has won five team gold medals with the German team as well as the individual title in 1996. With a computer game in her name, she is a legend in the equestrian industry. Let's look back on her career that spans 30 years.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 2 - Peder Fredricson
programme.desc: In episode 2 we are focussing on one of the most revered names in the world of showjumping today, two-time Olympic silver medalist, Peder Fredricson. Born in Södertälje, Sweden, he has won two olympic silver medals: on in team jumping at the 2004 Athens Olympics and a second one in individual jumping at the 2016 Rio Olympics.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Madrid

programme.desc: After Valkenswaard United won the first event of the Global Champions League in Doha, all other teams are starting to realize they will have to compenetrate perfectly to stand a chance. Relive the best moments of the GCL 2021 in Madrid.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Miami Beach
programme.desc: The second leg of the 2022 edition of the Longines Global Champions Tour is taking place in Miami. Uliano Vezzani has designed a mention-worthy course where only 6 out of the 34 initial riders made it to the jump-off. Rewatch the best moments of the LGCT 2022 Miami Grand Prix.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Miami Beach
programme.desc: Welcome to Miami! The city is filled with excitement, and for the second leg of the 2022 GCL it was not only chosen for its white sand beaches and clear waters, but also for the equestrian community that lives here. Fun, competition and excitement take part in this event that mesmerises people from all over the world as teams battle it out in the jump-off. For the first time ever, a team has won the Grand Prix with 0 faults. Enjoy the best moments in Miami on the 2022 edition of the Global Champions League.

programme.title: CSI2* Santander - Highlights
programme.desc: Welcome to Santander, once again the chosen scenery for the CSI2* Santander. The Palacio de la Magdalena reunites the finest riders at the Campa de la Magdalena to enjoy one of the most demanding and fun events in Spain. They will be competing on a circuit that surpasses 1.40m in height.Watch the 2021 season of CSI2* Santander to determine the best rider on their category.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 3
programme.desc: Students are getting ready for the outside course in where they will have to overcome harder jumping combinations. programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Miami Beach
programme.desc: The second leg of the 2022 edition of the Longines Global Champions Tour is taking place in Miami. Uliano Vezzani has designed a mention-worthy course where only 6 out of the 34 initial riders made it to the jump-off. Rewatch the best moments of the LGCT 2022 Miami Grand Prix.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Miami Beach
programme.desc: Welcome to Miami! The city is filled with excitement, and for the second leg of the 2022 GCL it was not only chosen for its white sand beaches and clear waters, but also for the equestrian community that lives here. Fun, competition and excitement take part in this event that mesmerises people from all over the world as teams battle it out in the jump-off. For the first time ever, a team has won the Grand Prix with 0 faults. Enjoy the best moments in Miami on the 2022 edition of the Global Champions League.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 3 - Igrid Klimke
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on one of the most iconic names in the equestrian world, German eventer Ingrid Klimke. With her horse Abraxxas, she won two gold medals in team eventing at the 2008 and 2012 Olympic Games. Despite never thinking she would have a career with horses, now she is an extremely successful rider.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 4 - Charlotte Dujardin
programme.desc: Charlotte Dujardin is a british dressage rider, equestrian and writer. She is probably the most successful British dressage rider in history, holder of three Dressage world records and winning major titles in international competitions with only 35 years. She is the Olympic dressage champion at London 2012 and Rio 2016. In this episode, we find out what drives her towards success.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 3 - Igrid Klimke
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on one of the most iconic names in the equestrian world, German eventer Ingrid Klimke. With her horse Abraxxas, she won two gold medals in team eventing at the 2008 and 2012 Olympic Games. Despite never thinking she would have a career with horses, now she is an extremely successful rider.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 4 - Charlotte Dujardin
programme.desc: Charlotte Dujardin is a british dressage rider, equestrian and writer. She is probably the most successful British dressage rider in history, holder of three Dressage world records and winning major titles in international competitions with only 35 years. She is the Olympic dressage champion at London 2012 and Rio 2016. In this episode, we find out what drives her towards success.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: Competition of the LGCT 2021 continues in the Club de Campo Villa de Madrid as the second leg of this event takes place in sunny Spain. programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Madrid
programme.desc: After Valkenswaard United won the first event of the Global Champions League in Doha, all other teams are starting to realize they will have to compenetrate perfectly to stand a chance. Relive the best moments of the GCL 2021 in Madrid.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Miami Beach
programme.desc: The second leg of the 2022 edition of the Longines Global Champions Tour is taking place in Miami. Uliano Vezzani has designed a mention-worthy course where only 6 out of the 34 initial riders made it to the jump-off. Rewatch the best moments of the LGCT 2022 Miami Grand Prix.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Miami Beach
programme.desc: Welcome to Miami! The city is filled with excitement, and for the second leg of the 2022 GCL it was not only chosen for its white sand beaches and clear waters, but also for the equestrian community that lives here. Fun, competition and excitement take part in this event that mesmerises people from all over the world as teams battle it out in the jump-off. For the first time ever, a team has won the Grand Prix with 0 faults. Enjoy the best moments in Miami on the 2022 edition of the Global Champions League.

programme.title: Arte Equestre TV - Episode 1 - Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021
programme.desc: After several years without an event, Uaipre decided to organize the Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021, and for the surprise of many, it was a huge success. The time needed to organize the event was very limited due to changes in organization, but the will and compromise of all organisers saw outstanding performances from the Italian cowboy dressage riders. We participate in the event and interview both organizers and participants to grasp their overall impressions.

programme.desc: Charlotte Dujardin is a british dressage rider, equestrian and writer. She is probably the most successful British dressage rider in history, holder of three Dressage world records and winning major titles in international competitions with only 35 years. She is the Olympic dressage champion at London 2012 and Rio 2016. In this episode, we find out what drives her towards success.
