programme.title: Arte Equestre TV - Episode 1 - Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021
programme.desc: After several years without an event, Uaipre decided to organize the Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021, and for the surprise of many, it was a huge success. The time needed to organize the event was very limited due to changes in organization, but the will and compromise of all organisers saw outstanding performances from the Italian cowboy dressage riders. We participate in the event and interview both organizers and participants to grasp their overall impressions.

programme.title: Banorte Trophy - Highlights
programme.desc: The two-round challenge for the Banorte Trophy has 40 riders competing in this CSI5* test of the LGCT Mexico. With a height of 1.55m with a jump-off, this course designed by Javier Trenor has 13 obstacles and 16 jumps and will prove to be problematic for the riders who will have to speed up and offer a clear performance in order to win.Watch the highlights of the Banorte Trophy 2019 edition inside the LGCT.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 5 - Boyd Exell
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on one of the most iconic name in the sport of carriage driving, the Australian Boyd Exell. Fascinated by horses from a very young age, he moved to the United Kingdom to develop this early talent, and soon he became the first Athlete in history of the sport to compete in three different World Championships: horse singles, horse pairs and four in hand.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 6 - Martin Fuchs
programme.desc: FEI Icons is a series looking back at the careers of some of the most successful and influential equestrian athletes of the 21st century. In this episode, we are focussing on the Swiss sensation, Martin Fuchs, who at only 27 years old had already propelled himself to the top of the Show jumping world. Discover his story.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 1 - Houghton Hall
programme.desc: The 2021 FEI Eventing Nations Cup has started its first leg at Houghton Hall. The British team of Tom McEwen, Mollie Summerland and Georgie Spence are eager to take the first place at home, but Australian Kevin McNab, Sam Griffiths and Sophie Adams are proving to be a worthy rival. Watch the best moments of the Houghton Hall leg at the 2021 FEI Eventing Nations Cup.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 2 - Strzegom
programme.desc: Great Britain might have won the first leg of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup, but Strzegom is a new opportunity for the other teams to shine. Poland has started with a 128.8 team point lead, but Germany is following closely on 135.0. Who will be the winning team?

programme.title: FEI Jumping European Championship - Italy - Team Competition
programme.desc: FEI Jumping European Championship - Italy - Team Competition

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 2
programme.desc: Bruno Chimirri lectures the students on what is needed to become an equestrian pro. He talks about the bond between a horse and rider, how he manages stress at competitions and the mental preparation he undergoes when detecting possible problems in the field. Then, the students get on the reins to practice jumps.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 4 - Madrid
programme.desc: We move to Madrid, the city that hosts the fourth leg of one of the most challenging and demanding show jumping competitions in the world: the Longines Global Champions Tour. With a height over 1.50m, precision is key in order to top the podium. Relive the best moments of the 2022 edition of the LGCT in Madrid.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 4 - Madrid
programme.desc: Madrid, Spain. The weather forecasts a sunny day with no clouds. An eager audience sits down with excitement waiting for the jump off to begin and the riders get ready to give their all in the fourth leg of the 2022 Global Champions Tour. However, the score could take a turn any time, as the top riders are teaming up for their golden ticket in the Playoffs. Relive the best moments of the fourth leg of the 2022 GCL in Madrid.

programme.title: Oxfordshire Cup - Ferne Park vs Black Bears

Black Bears remains yet undefeated within the Oxfordshire Cup. Will Ferne Park be able to change the turns of the competition and raise victorious in the competition?Watch the final between Ferne Park and Black Bears on Horse TV.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 5 - Boyd Exell
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on one of the most iconic name in the sport of carriage driving, the Australian Boyd Exell. Fascinated by horses from a very young age, he moved to the United Kingdom to develop this early talent, and soon he became the first Athlete in history of the sport to compete in three different World Championships: horse singles, horse pairs and four in hand.

programme.title: FEI Icons - Episode 6 - Martin Fuchs
programme.desc: FEI Icons is a series looking back at the careers of some of the most successful and influential equestrian athletes of the 21st century. In this episode, we are focussing on the Swiss sensation, Martin Fuchs, who at only 27 years old had already propelled himself to the top of the Show jumping world. Discover his story.

programme.title: Jumping International La Baule - GP La Baule
programme.desc: The competition that closes the madness that has happened at the Longines Jumping International in La Baule is definitely the Grand Prix. For a grand total of 200,000 euros, riders face a first round and a jump-off with a height of 1.60m. There is no mistake that, at a ranking of CSIO 5*, this is one of the toughest competitions in France only possible for the top equestrian athletes.Watch the highlights for La Baule Grand Prix 2019.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 1 - Houghton Hall
programme.desc: The 2021 FEI Eventing Nations Cup has started its first leg at Houghton Hall. programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 2 - Strzegom

programme.title: Arte Equestre TV - Episode 1 - Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021
programme.desc: After several years without an event, Uaipre decided to organize the Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021, and for the surprise of many, it was a huge success. The time needed to organize the event was very limited due to changes in organization, but the will and compromise of all organisers saw outstanding performances from the Italian cowboy dressage riders. We participate in the event and interview both organizers and participants to grasp their overall impressions.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 3 - Mexico City
programme.desc: Mexico City welcomes the third leg of the 2022 edition of the Longines Global Champions Tour. Riders have already been able to test each other skills twice, so now that they know how high the level is, they are eager to push even harder to score higher in the standings. Will they be able to reach the jump-off with no mistakes? Watch the best moments of the third leg in Mexico City.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 3 - Mexico City
programme.desc: We travel to Mexico City for the third leg of the 2022 Global Champions League circuit. Riders team up to earn more points and get closer to the podium in this competition that travels around all continents. They will have to perform perfectly on the first round and then do their best during the jump-off. However, sometimes doing their best is not enough, as this competition expects them to do the extraordinary.

programme.title: Humorist Rob Kutner
programme.desc: Comedian Eli Leonard sits down with Emmy and Peabody award-winning Comedy Writer/Author Rob Kutner to discuss his book, "The Jews: 5000 Years and Counting."

programme.title: Hasidic Brooklyn's Local Economy
programme.desc: Frieda Vizel, raised as a member of the Satmar Hasidic Community, give us an inside look at the unique local economy in Hasidic Williamsburg Brooklyn, taking us on a walking tour through this very large Orthodox Jewish neighborhood.

programme.title: Hasidic Home & Hasidic Pastries
programme.desc: Frieda Vizel, raised as a member of the Satmar Hasidic Community, give us an inside look at Hasidic Williamsburg Brooklyn, taking us inside a traditional Hasidic Home and showing us her favorite Hasidic pastries.

programme.desc: Paul is a thrill seeker who wants to find love fast with someone that also enjoys the active lifestyle. Bubbies Bunny, Linda, and SJ have some ideas to help and find Paul his one true, thrill-seeking love..

programme.title: Ghost Stories 1: Walking With the dead
programme.desc: Walking with the Dead examines some of the most haunted places in the state of Indiana. See evidence of unexplainable paranormal events like visits from turn-of-the-century celebrities at Tuckaway House, appearances of Lady Rivoli at the Rivoli Theater and the angry energy of past prisoners at Hartford City Jail.

programme.title: I'm Ringo
programme.desc: Argentine Boxer Oscar Bonavena, popularly known as Ringo because of his Beatle haircut was murdered at the age of 33 at the gates of a legendary Mustang brothel in Nevada. He fought Muhammad Ali in 1970, and was a top heavyweight contender through much of the 1960's. It still unknown the full reasons why Bonavena was killed but he was employed as a bouncer at the Mustang Ranch at the time and Bonavena became involved with the owner of ranch Joe Conforte's wife Sally Burgess, 26 years Bonavena's senior and had bragged about taking over the Mustang Ranch. After being banded from the ranch by Conforte he dared to return. The guards had orders to shoot Bonavena if he showed up but after a confrontation at the gate Bonavena was shot and killed by the guard. Originally charged with murder, the guard pleaded guilty to voluntary manslaughter and served only 15 months in prison but the owner of the ranch was never charged.

programme.title: Running Against Dick
programme.desc: Trials and tribulations of a third party candidate as he struggles to keep his mind and campaign straight running for congress against Dick Gephardt.

programme.title: Spooks Hoods And JFK
programme.desc: Confessions of the JFK murder

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: With aerial footage from fifty-four countries, 'Home' is a depiction of how Earth's problems are all interlinked.

programme.title: The Basement
programme.desc: Artist and Playwright Darrell Fusaro returns home to Clifton, New Jersey to face demons cast by the brutal 1970 mafia-style slaying of his beloved Grandfather, Union Official James Fusaro.

programme.title: The Viking Maid
programme.desc: Despite record salmon runs in the state of Alaska, wild Salmon fishermen struggle to stay afloat in the flooded salmon markets of the world. This documentary is a journey aboard an Alaskan salmon seining vessel, exploring the lifestyle and adventure of a dying breed of men, the last of hunters and gatherers who dare to take on mother nature to earn a living. Journey aboard the Viking Maid, atop the erratic seas of Southeast Alaska, and find out why you should always ask, "is this salmon farmed or wild?"

programme.title: Disaster At Devil's Jaw
programme.desc: Disaster At Devil's Jaw

programme.title: Aliens Uncovered: Marilyn Monroe Exposed
programme.desc: With UFO abductions and close encounters, did the President attempt to disclose information in an unorthodox way, warning us of what was to come?

programme.title: The Least of My Brothers
programme.desc: The story of the desegregation of Vidor, Texas, and the murder investigation of the first African American man to move there.

programme.title: Leah Culver: Creating Light
programme.desc: Up and coming pop artist, Leah Culver finds herself in a fast paced roller coaster ride of highs and lows as she navigates loss and perpetual development as an artist finding her voice as she rolls the dice in the wild game that is the music industry.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.desc: An outcast Confederate soldier redeems himself by defending a woman against bandits willing to kill for her goldmine claim

programme.desc: A special agent from Chicago is sent out west to bring in the notorious Reno brothers

programme.title: Duel on the Mississippi

programme.title: Ghost Town Law

programme.desc: The Range Busters have a plan to get into the outlaw's hideout in Fugitive Valley

programme.desc: A boy raised by the Sioux must choose sides

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Three deserters escaped from an Army stockade to the Ponderosa

programme.title: Arizona bound
programme.desc: The Rough Riders are called upon to help save a stagecoach line

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ranchers are being killed, cattle stolen, what is going on?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: As is often the case on Bonanza, things are not always as they first seem. Hoss and Adam eventually learn who is the good guy and who is not

programme.title: WInds of the wasteland
programme.desc: The arrival of the telegraph put Pony Express riders like John Blair and his pal Smoky out of work. A race will decide whether they or stageline owner Drake get the government mail contract

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben shot Luke Grayson in self-defense, but Todd won't listen to this

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A Texan sheriff and his younger brother travel across the border into Mexico to confront the man who killed their father

programme.title: Buffalo Gun
programme.desc: The Indians claim that their government rations are being stolen and they threaten to fight back

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights come to the aid of a Chinese-American stable hand accused of murder. Opposing them is a manipulative mayoral candidate who wants all "foreigners" to leave Virginia City

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and Little Joe are mistaken for bloodthirsty hired killers in a small Texas town dominated by two feuding families

programme.title: Guns of Diablo
programme.desc: Wagon train scout Linc Murdock reminisces about his old feud with a rancher

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After a U.S. deputy marshal apparently saves Adam's life by gunning down two men who shot at him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Dolly runs away with her boyfriend

programme.title: The Shooting
programme.desc: A mysterious woman persuades two cowboys to help her in a revenge scheme

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Inspector Leduque comes from New Orleans to Virginia City to take Ben Cartwright back for a 20-year-old murder

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss falls prey to the wiles of a beautiful woman with a gambling addiction

programme.title: Vengenace Valley
programme.desc: The sons of a Colorado cattle baron, one biological and the other adopted, resent one another and fight for control of their father's cattle empire

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jennifer Beale is abducted in the hopes her rich father, Joshua, the richest silver baron on the Comstock, will pay a $1M ransom. The plan unravels when the beautiful Della is killed and Hercules, who loves her, finds out who did it.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jeb Drummond is a murderous sheep herder that has Adam taken hostage to try and force Ben to sign over a large section of Ponderosa land to him

programme.title: Kentucky Rifle
programme.desc: While the wagon train forges ahead, a few people stay behind to repair a disabled rifle-filled wagon but they have to contend with one another's ego and with aggressive Comanches who demand the rifles as payment for safe passage

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Gunnar is a long-lost relative of the Cartwright family. When Gunnar arrives at the Ponderosa, the family takes him in for the evening. Gunnar is the brother to one of Ben Cartwright's late wives. Unbeknownst to the Cartwright family, Gunnar is also the leader of a band of criminals called The Comancheros. Little Joe is visiting his girlfriend away from the ranch. When Little Joe and his girlfriend are kidnapped by The Comancheros, the Cartwrights and Gunnar are forced into a difficult situation

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights' neighbor Tom Edwards has lived as a paraplegic, ever since an accident involving Ben Cartwright and a gun. His ranch is going to waste. His wife Joyce is a longtime friend of Ben, and Ben decides to help the Edwards couple by making Tom a business proposition:

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: On the doorstep of Yellowstone Park, ride the appaloosa horses of the Nine Quarter Circle Ranch; Montana’s Western Woodstock - the Red Ants Pants Music Festival; Making buffalo coats at Merlin’s Hide Out in Wyoming; plus the Montana target shooting match inspired by a Tom Selleck Western.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss mentors a lonely, mentally challenged man who, with superhuman size and strength, becomes extremely dangerous when angered

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: About to set out on a cattle drive, Ben hires a young drifter named Sam Jackson as one of his drovers. What he doesn't know is that Jackson is really outlaw Johnny Logan, who signed on to the drive because he knew it was going to pass near the town of Waycross, and Logan is determined to kill the Waycross sheriff--who is his father.

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: Ride in the shadow of the Sierras at California’s historic Hunewill Ranch; roll through California’s gold country with the Days of 49 wagon train; and meet the Western artisans of Ricotti Saddle Company.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jacob Darien is leading his family of Quakers through Virginia City

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: Today’s Wild West takes you to Montana for an eight day horseback immersion into the life of a U.S. Cavalry soldier, at the site of the Battle of the Little Bighorn.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An outlaw gang robs Virginia City's bank and makes off with almost all of its money

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Prejudice erupts on both sides!

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: You’ll have a horseback view of one the greatest adventures in Today’s Wild West, as we drive a herd of 500 horses for two days over sixty grueling miles, outside Craig, Colorado.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: In the far reaches of space, a small crew, 20 years into their solitary mission, find things beginning to go hilariously wrong

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a powerful gang plagues Virginia City with a murderous protection racket, the Cartwrights are determined to stop it even as it threatens them

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: New Mexico’s Chuckwagon Trail Ride; the horseback lessons of life at California’s Rawhide Ranch summer camp for kids; and the unique batiks of Montana artist Echo Ukrainetz.

programme.desc: The Cartwrights try to disprove the validity of a Spanish land grant to stop the De La Cuesta family from seizinglands

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Charlie Trent used to be an Army scout. Now he's the town drunk. Hoss helps him regain his self-esteem when he has him volunteer to lead a gold-bearing troop through the desert where there's very little water.

programme.title: Today’s Wild West

programme.title: The Concert Series s1e2 Leonard Gilbert
programme.desc: THE CONCERT SERIES is a television series featuring musical performances by the greatest artists on the classical world stage. This episode features pianist Leonard Gilbert performing at the ZoomerPlex.

programme.title: Healing Gardens s1e4 Whistling Gardens 'Healing Trauma- Cultivating Serenity'
programme.desc: This series explores the healing nature of gardens and the transformative power derived from the act of gardening.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Mikey Ciccarelli
programme.desc: Mikey Ciccarelli is one of Burton’s top riders. His bag of tricks runs deep. When making the leap from the pro contest scene into the world of backcountry riding, he did so without missing a beat. In 2024, he won Natural Selection. Today, he shares the screen with his heroes. Meet “Psycho Mikey.”

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Snowdance
programme.desc: Snowdance is a backcountry snowboarding film. Because even if you’ve never set foot in the backcountry, you can still be grateful that it’s there. Seven years and one pandemic since their fruition, The ManBoys roster still remains largely intact with Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Matt Belzile, Jody Wachniak, Beau Bishop & Eric Jackson. Snowdance was filmed by Ben Webb, Connor Winton, Dave Craig, and Ryan Kenny.

programme.title: The Manboys Movie
programme.desc: The boys are back with new friends and a brand new snowboard film. The Manboys Movie will definitely top your expectations. Featuring bangers from Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Craig McMorris, Jody Wachniak, Matt Belzile, Anto Chamberland, and Mark Sollors.

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Business Casual
programme.desc: Business Casual follows the Burton Snowboards crew and the Manboys as they enjoy the best part of the season in the Whistler area while Rusty Ockenden learns to operate a camera. The ManBoys crew encourages anyone who wants to get into the backcountry to take a first aid & avalanche course with your whole crew. Be safe, have fun, learn from your mistakes - and learn from theirs. Featuring Jody Wachniak, Mark Sollors, Noah Cohen, Mikey Rencz, Matt Belzile, and Beau Bishop. Directed and edited by Rusty Ockenden

programme.title: K2 Snowboarding Presents: Jumbo Easy
programme.desc: K2 Snowboarding Presents: Jumbo Easy

programme.title: Wash'Dup
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this mockumentary film will follow a group of ex- snowboard filmmakers and ex-pro riders who never hung it up. Still in love with the sport and fueled by mid life crisis, these shred for lifers are extremely vulnerable to delusions of grandeur. But the dream is always “still alive” in their minds. In turn they ignore all the red flags and continue to do what seems completely irrational to everyone except for them. After a 16 year hiatus, they irresponsibly put their adult obligations behind, and join a pact to make just one last movie. But they are missing a solid presence of youth to make their movie marketable. As a remedy they end up filming with riders that span 2 generations. This unlikely alliance leads them to discover much more about snowboarding and themselves by living the snowboarding dream through an ageless lens. Filled with sketch comedy skits, this film expresses the nuanced story of a young sport reaching a level of maturity the current industry now begins to embrace. From the death of the snowboard shop, and extinction of film media, to the old pro struggling to find their way in life after the glory days are long gone, WashDup is a story that finally needs to be told.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Half Banked at Mt Baker
programme.desc: Terje and Leo Cittadella head to Mt. Baker, Washington to meet up with with Russell Winfield and Rip Zinger to compete in the 33rd Legendary Banked Slalom. During a windstorm, a tree falls on the house while everyone is asleep. Terje gets waxing tips from Olympic gold medalist Seth Westcott.

programme.title: La Zone
programme.desc:
In the early 2000's, snowboard filmer David 'Vlad' Vladyka and a handful of riders discovered an off-the-radar area on the French-Swiss border that held massive potential for shooting freestyle snowboarding. The mountain pass featured rolling terrain punctuated by steep roll overs that are perfect for building jumps. The area was Le Col de Cou, and though it had a name, the riders called it 'La Zone', a purposefully vague nickname that would help them keep the area a secret.
Over the next decade, La Zone would become one of the most productive and standard setting locations for filming freestyle snowboarding in all of Europe. Shots from La Zone were featured in several Absinthe films, and many others.
Now 20 years later, Jones team rider Mat Schaer and Vlad still return to La Zone to film from time to time, but the pristine slopes they enjoyed in the past are much harder to find as Le Col de Cou has become a popular ski touring destination.
Featuring new and historic footage from La Zone, this new short film directed by Julien Rosens, and produced by Absinthe Films, highlights the history, beauty and inevitable evolution of this legendary shred spot.
Credits LA ZONE, a movie directed by Julien Roserens Produced by Absinthe Films Supported by Jonessnowboards, Region Dents du Midi, Doodah store Edited by Jules Guarneri Soundmix by Stephane Chapelle Graphics by René Zumstein Photo by Michael Cordey Music : Tugrul by Ochre, Rhea by Yehezkel Raz, Where It Beginns It Ends by Be Still The Earth, Strange Life de YGGL, Let Us Get Out by Redder

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Spacé - Woods
programme.desc: The Larch Forests are the highest in the Swiss Alps. The old trees hold back snow, reduce avalanche danger, and offer contrast during low visibility conditions. Snowboarder Frederik Kalbermatten shows you how to navigate steep pillow lines and narrow gullies in this uniquely challenging terrain.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Spacé - Glacier
programme.desc: Riding glaciers is one of the most demanding challenges of any alpine region. All his life, the snowboarder Frederik Kalbermatten has lived in close proximity to the glaciers of the Swiss Alps. To this day, he constantly follows their flow and rides the eternal ice unlike anyone on earth.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Spacé - Couloir
programme.desc: Snowboarder Frederik Kalbermatten lives surrounded by 13 mountains, each higher than 4,000 meters. Only a few have dared these descents. Some couloirs are accessible when conditions are perfect, others only open their doors for a brief moment. Kalbermatten masters them all with flow and style.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever
programme.desc: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: TurboDojo
programme.desc: Hailed as one of the standout Absinthe productions "TurboDojo" features Mikkel Bang, Nicolas Müller, Kimmy Fasani, Hans Mindnich, Brandon Cocard, Austen Sweetin, Brendan Gerard, Ben Ferguson, Max Buri, and more.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Nippow Holiday
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen invites the filmmaker and musician, Leo Cittadella, to join him and Rip Zinger on a powder trip to Hokkaido, Japan. Along the way, they meet up with Nicolas Müller and Mikkel Bang to film for the Absinthe Films feature "TurboDojo.”

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Half Banked at Mt. Baker
programme.desc: Terje and Leo Cittadella head to Mt. Baker, Washington to meet up with with Russell Winfield and Rip Zinger to compete in the 33rd Legendary Banked Slalom. During a windstorm, a tree falls on the house while everyone is asleep. Terje gets waxing tips from Olympic gold medalist Seth Westcott.

programme.title: Soundfield Vol 1
programme.desc: Full video of Sound Field by Aaron Farley

programme.title: Soundfield Vol 2
programme.desc: Soundfield Vol 2

programme.title: Artist Profile - José Medeles
programme.desc: For most artists, music is a way of life. On this episode of the Artist Profile series, we follow José Medeles through a day in the life as he shares his journey from La Salle, Illinois to touring with The Breeders, to founding the Revival Drum Shop and making music as one half of 1939 Ensemble.

programme.title: Marmoset Presents: Bridge City Revival
programme.desc: Bridge City Revival is the acclaimed music collective from Portland, Oregon. Inspired by the soulful 60s, BCR was raised on The Chi-Lites, Otis Redding, Isley Brothers, Lee Fields, and Sharon Jones. Banger drum breaks. Driving bass. Rhythmic guitar. Rolling keyboards. Soulful brass. That’s BCR!

programme.title: Artist Profile - WebsterX
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus our cameras on the hip-hop artist WebsterX as he prepares for his hometown performance at the summer TDM Festival in Milwaukee, Wisconsin. FIlmed by Josh Brine and Kale Chesney.

programme.title: Visitations - La Sera: Devil’s Hearts Grow Gold
programme.desc: La Sera performing "Devils Hearts Grow Gold" at Room 205. A few days before embarking on their first UK tour, mastermind Katy Goodman (vox/bass), Jennifer Prince (guitar/vox), and Jonathan Weil (drums), stopped by to blast through a few songs from Katy's upcoming full-length on Hardly Art.

programme.title: Visitations - La Sera: Never Come Around
programme.desc: La Sera performing 'Never Come Around' at Room 205. A few days before embarking on their first UK tour, La Sera stopped by Room 205 to play songs from the band’s upcoming LP on Hardly Art. The project's inspiration springs from an attraction to ethereal choral vocals and pop hits of the 1950's.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Waves Of Blood
programme.desc: The core of Atoms and Void is formed in the friendship and songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. “Waves of Blood” features cartwheeling post-rock guitars, buoyant bass, and double-drummers bashing away like shutters in a hurricane. Good for long walks and red-eye flights.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - This Departing Landscape
programme.desc: Atoms and Void is formed in the songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. The video for the song, “This Departing Landscape,” is an awkwardly beautiful collection of footage from years of touring and recording, proving the maxim, “life is about the journey, not the destination.”

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Golden Shivers
programme.desc: Atoms and Void is formed in the songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. “Golden Shivers” is a beautiful piece of ambient electronic music akin to the works of minimalist composers Steve Reich and Meredith Monk. Good for running, dancing, driving, and doing the dishes. Play loud.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Lay Down Your Weapons
programme.desc: “Lay Down Your Weapons” is a respite from the cacophony of the world. Atoms and Void is musician Arlie Carstens, of Seattle’s Juno, and producer Eric Fisher. Known for his skateboarding films, Director Greg Hunt here lets landscapes and cityscapes slowly unfold. Breathe deeply, watch and listen.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Romain DeMarchi - Dose 01
programme.desc: MICRODOSE Romain DeMarchi - Dose 01

programme.title: MICRODOSE Romain DeMarchi - Dose 02
programme.desc: MICRODOSE Romain DeMarchi - Dose 02

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: A classic from the Absinthe Films vault, Vivid features some of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi and Nicolas Müller's best achievements when they were still young bucks.

programme.title: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: More
programme.desc: Absinthe Films Snowboarding Feature (2006)

programme.title: Assisted Living
programme.desc: After watching Spencer Schubert’s part in the Torment snowboarding film, “Good Sport,” Mikey Leblanc found himself inspired to get back on the toboggan. One phone call later and the newly formed duo got to work filming "ASSISTED LIVING.” This short-film will have you icing your knees in no time.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Yellow Flickers
programme.desc: Do the lines in the road countdown to a supposed arrival? Or are they added up within us, allowing us to grow?

programme.title: Standing Ovation
programme.desc: Standing Ovation

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 01
programme.desc: Jamie Lynn is an introvert. In his snowboarding and art-making, however, he’s big and expressive. Watch Episode 1 of his legendary Microdose series. Featuring Circe Wallace, Mike Hatchett, Sean Sullivan, Temple Cummins, Jason Loeb, Micah Shapiro, Colter Gerber, Apostalos and Demetrius Karabotsos.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of the Jamie Lynn series, Jamie talks about how the creativity of the artists and skateboarders Mark Gonzales and Neil Blender guides his approach to life as a snowboarder and artist. Featuring Circe Wallace, Matt Cummins, Dano Pendygrasse, Joel Gomez, Scott Sullivan, and Matt Remine.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 03
programme.desc: In Episode 3 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, we talk with a pioneering professional snowboarder and filmmaker, an iconic 90s shredder, and a Tahoe photographer about Jamie Lynn. Join us for tales of guts, gusto, and good jumping genes. Featuring Dave Seoane, Peter Line, and Ruben Sanchez.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 04
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series we talk with a handful of Jamie’s fellow athletes and industry peers about his loyalties to Sessions, Volcom, Vans, and LibTech among other sponsors. Featuring Joel Gomez, Dave Seoane, Richard Woolcott, Bryan Iguchi, Mike Parillo, and Billy Anderson.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 05
programme.desc: In Episode 5 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Terje Haakonsen shares his insights on Mr. Lynn. From annual meet-ups at Mt. Baker to destinations around the world, Terje takes you there. Featuring Terje Haakonsen, Bryan Iguchi, Richard Woolcott, Ryan Immegart, Mike Parillo, and Troy Eckert.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 06
programme.desc: In Episode 6 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Jamie details the process of filming the iconic Volcom snowboarding movie, ‘The Garden,’ directed by Richard Woolcott. Spoiler Alert: The experience was awesome. Featuring Troy Eckert, Tucker Hall, Billy Anderson, Nicholas Adams, and Mike Parillo.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 07
programme.desc: In Episode 7, we set the snowboarding tales aside to go deep on Jamie Lynn’s passion for art-making. Tune-in to learn how Lynn’s tight-knit crew motivated one another, both on and off the hill, to pursue parallel paths in visual art. Featuring Bryan Iguchi, Schoph, Jamie Heinrich and Pete Saari.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski & Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Visitations - David Flores
programme.desc: David Flores is a designer and painter. He’s worked in the world of skateboarding for decades, creating graphics for brands such as Shortys, Real, Stereo, Thunder, Anti Hero, Powell Peralta, Spitfire Wheels, and more. Beyond skateboarding, Flores paints murals and shows work at galleries worldwide.

programme.title: Visitations - Get Up And Get Out
programme.desc: For this episode of Visitations, director Aaron Farley spent a day capturing Chris Moore skateboarding around Greater Los Angeles. Why? Farley wanted to make a short film urging people to go outside. No dialogue. No interview questions. Just push power and a body in motion. Enjoy.

programme.title: Visitations - Smoothie
programme.desc: Visitations - Smoothie

programme.title: Visitations - Evan Hecox
programme.desc: In 2015, the artist Evan Hecox was asked to create a large mural at The Standard Hollywood. In this short film, director Aaron Farley captures his creative process. Hecox's work can be seen in solo and group shows throughout the United States, Europe, Australia, Japan, and Hong Kong.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Y La Bamba
programme.desc: In this episode, we highlight the Mexican American artist Luz Mendoza of Y La Bamba. The film follows the musician as she traces her roots and creative inspirations. Filmed in 2017, on the eve of Y La Bamba's Dia de los Muertos (Day of the Dead) performance at Holocene in Portland, Oregon.

programme.title: Hwuy’xwet Pune’luxutth (Opening Penelakut)
programme.desc: This beautiful documentary follows a group of First Nation’s students at Penelakut Island Elementary School as they work with Riley McIntosh to create a new mountain bike trail for the community. Throughout the film, director Jason Mannings shares the history of Penelakut Island and its people.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 1
programme.desc: Your friends at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 2
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 3
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 4
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Motherload
programme.desc: The hardest part of any adventure is getting out the door. Planning is tedious. Packing is time consuming. Once on-hill, everything falls into place. Follow pro skiers Izzy Lynch and Tessa Treadway as they carry the load of life changing events and the love of their children into the mountains.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 01
programme.desc: Kimmy Fasani is a world class athlete, a loving mother, a natural leader, and a true champion of women in professional snowboarding. In Episode 1 of her Microdose series, we learn where Fasani’s glorious story begins. Featuring Shannon Dunn, Donna Carpenter, Hana Beaman, Gabe Taylor and Ryan Runke.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we learn how Kimmy Fasani stepped away from the contest scene and into backcountry snowboarding with help from shred legend Devun Walsh and innovator Iikka Backstrom. Featuring Chris Benchetler, Devun Walsh, Adam Moran, Bryan Knox and Peter Morning.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 03
programme.desc: As a Burton athlete, Kimmy Fasani has long been a champion of change in women's snowboarding. Innovative products. Fair pay. Better contracts. Sick ripping. Watch and be uplifted. Featuring Hana Beaman, Pat Bridges, Danny Davis, Gabe Taylor, Kevin Pearce, Bryan Knox, Adam Moran and Peter Morning.

programme.title: Evo Explores - Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: TurboDojo
programme.desc: Hailed as one of the standout Absinthe productions "TurboDojo" features Mikkel Bang, Nicolas Müller, Kimmy Fasani, Hans Mindnich, Brandon Cocard, Austen Sweetin, Brendan Gerard, Ben Ferguson, Max Buri, and more.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Two
programme.desc: The snowboarders Rip Zinger and Terje Haakonsen ride powder in Japan. Years after his recovery from a debilitating head injury, they get Kevin Pearce back on snow. Join us for this episode of friendship, freshies, and freeriding.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Three
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen explores the joys of Japanese mountain culture with his friends Kevin Pearce, Mikkel Bang, Rip Zinger, Oli Gittler, Curtis Ciszek, Leo Cittadella and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Attunga - A Higher Place
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three Norwegian snowboarders: legendary purist Terje Haakonsen, holistic-minded Torgeir Bergrem, and carefree wunderkind Marcus Kleveland. Watch as filmmaker and snowboarder Seth Huot pulls back the curtain to examine their common purpose, potential, pitfalls, and paychecks.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Relax If You Can
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen and Leo Cittadella go snowskating at the vast Austrian ski resort of Ischgl. While enjoying a timeout along the Swiss-Austrian border, they discuss European cultural differences and similarities.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Hana Beaman - Dose 01
programme.desc: "Hana not only rode out the Grenade years, she was the queen." – Travis Rice

programme.title: MICRODOSE Hana Beaman - Dose 02
programme.desc: The Rise and Rise of Hana Beaman – Athlete, Mentor, Friend.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Hana Beaman - Dose 03
programme.desc: The Stoke Is Real.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: On The Verge
programme.desc: In the mountains behind the coastal town of Powell River, BC, rock climbers have spent decades quietly pioneering routes on some of the largest granite walls in Canada. As the landscape comes under threat of logging, the climbing community faces an uncertain future. Lives! Logs! Legacies!

programme.title: Arc'teryx Presents: Em
programme.desc: Emilie Pellerin is the best climber you’ve never heard of. In her debut film, “Em”, director Alexa Fay sets out to prove it. To become a world class climber requires a problem-solving mindset, positivity, natural ability and commitment to the “dirtbag life.” This film puts Pellerin front and center.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 1: California to Arizona
programme.desc: In Episode 1, the Volcom Skate Team ride motorcycles through the California and Arizona deserts, embracing all that the open road has to offer. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Remy Stratton, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 2: Arizona to Utah
programme.desc: In Episode 2, the Volcom Skate Team find themselves motorcycling and skateboarding through Arizona and Utah, with a stop at the Grand Canyon. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Remy Stratton, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 3: Belgium to Germany
programme.desc: In Episode 3, the Volcom Skate Team motorcycle through Belgium and Germany, ride skateboards, and visit The Picturebooks. Featuring Jonathan Thijs, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Fynn Grabke, Phillip Mirtschink, Claus Grabke, and Baumi.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 4: Germany to Denmark
programme.desc: In Episode 4, the Volcom Skate Team ride through Germany and Denmark. In Copenhagen, they visit Motorious, a vintage motorcycle shop. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Chris Pfanner, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Jelle Keppens, Jonathan Thijs and Kasper Krogh.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 5: Denmark to Sweden
programme.desc: In Episode 5, the Volcom Skate Team ride motorcycles through Denmark and Sweden, go camping, and hang at Fücker Fest, a motorcycle festival in Sweden. Featuring Collin Provost, Chris Pfanner, Jackson Pilz, Arto Saari, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Jelle Keppens, and Jonathan Thijs.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 6: Mexico
programme.desc: In this bonus episode, skaters CJ Collins, Jackson Pilz, and others ride motorcycles between Mexico City and San Miguel de Allende. Featuring Collin Provost, CJ Collins, Braulio Sagas, Kervin Miranda, Luka Barrena, Arto Saari, Diego Espinoza, Ginther Estrada, Ryan Loughridge, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Volcom Stone Age – Mexico + Puerto Rico Skate Tour
programme.desc: On the down low, this film is called "Montezuma's Revenge.” Why? Watch and learn as skaters Chima Ferguson, Collin Provost, Louie Lopez, Kyle Walker and Alexis Rivera tear their way through Mexico and Puerto Rico on the 2012 Volcom Stone Age Skate Tour. Filmed by Su Young Choi and Jacob Smith.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Stay Tuned
programme.desc: ‘Stay Tuned’ is a snowboard film. It is also a film about the need to stay tuned mentally and physically with the natural world. Featuring Mikkel Bang, Nicolas Müller, John Jackson, Brandon Cocard, Ben Ferguson, Red Gerard, Severin Van Der Meer, Dylan Alito, Judd Henkes, and Hans Mindnich.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Back Yard Boogie
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen rips his back yard on the snow-skate and Rip Zinger...well, yeah he gets creative too.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Winter Leisure
programme.desc: Legendary snowboarder Terje Haakonsen finds new joy in riding small parks and mellow terrain wherever he goes, explaining, “What I like about snowskates is that it makes small hills big again.” Join us for this fascinating look at snowskate subculture.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Re-Laax-ed Spring Break
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen - Re-Laax-ed Spring Break

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NOW/HERE
programme.desc: The winter of 2010 brought many challenges to snowboarders all over the world. The Absinthe Films documentary, NOW/HERE, examines just how much our reality is affected by what we make of it. Are you lost? Or are you where you need to be and just don’t know it yet?

programme.title: Flipside - NowHere Episode 1
programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com
